title: ProRL Agent: Rollout-as-a-Service for RL Training of Multi-Turn LLM Agents
authors: Hao Zhang, Mingjie Liu, Shaokun Zhang, Songyang Han, Jian Hu, Zhenghui Jin, Yuchi Zhang, Shizhe Diao, Ximing Lu, Binfeng Xu, Zhiding Yu, Jan Kautz, Yi Dong
abstract: Multi-turn LLM agents are increasingly important for solving complex, interactive tasks, and reinforcement learning (RL) is a key ingredient for improving their long-horizon behavior. However, RL training requires generating large numbers of sandboxed rollout trajectories, and existing infrastructures often couple rollout orchestration with the training loop, making systems hard to migrate and maintain. Under the rollout-as-a-service philosophy, we present ProRL Agent , a scalable infrastructure that serves the full agentic rollout lifecycle through an API service. ProRL Agent also provides standardized and extensible sandbox environments that support diverse agentic tasks in rootless HPC settings. We validate ProRL Agent through RL training on software engineering, math, STEM, and coding tasks. ProRL Agent is open-sourced and integrated as part of NVIDIA NeMo Gym.
title_zh: ProRL Agent：面向多轮LLM智能体强化学习训练的“推理即服务”方案
abstract_zh: 多轮大语言模型代理在解决复杂、交互式任务方面日益重要，而强化学习（RL）则是提升其长周期行为表现的关键要素。然而，RL训练需要生成大量沙盒化的轨迹数据，现有基础设施通常将轨迹生成与训练循环紧密耦合，导致系统难以迁移和维护。基于“轨迹即服务”（rollout-as-a-service）的理念，我们提出了 ProRL Agent，这是一个可扩展的基础设施，通过API服务支持代理全生命周期的轨迹生成。ProRL Agent 还提供标准化且可扩展的沙盒环境，能够在无根权限的高性能计算（HPC）环境中支持多样化的代理任务。我们在软件工程、数学、STEM及编程等任务上通过强化学习训练验证了 ProRL Agent 的有效性。该系统已开源，并作为 NVIDIA NeMo Gym 的一部分集成。

title: Automatic Configuration of LLM Post-Training Pipelines
authors: Channe Chwa, Xinle Wu, Yao Lu
abstract: LLM post-training pipelines that combine supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning are difficult to configure under realistic compute budgets: the configuration space is high-dimensional and heterogeneous, stages are strongly coupled, and each end-to-end evaluation is expensive. We propose AutoPipe, a budget-aware two-stage framework for configuration selection in LLM post-training. Offline, AutoPipe learns a dataset-conditioned learning-to-rank surrogate from historical runs, capturing within-dataset preferences and providing transferable guidance toward promising regions of the configuration space. Online, for a new dataset, AutoPipe uses the offline guidance to steer Bayesian optimization and models dataset-specific deviations with a Gaussian-process residual surrogate. To reduce evaluation cost, each trial is early-stopped and scored by a learned predictor that maps early training signals to a low-cost proxy for final post-training performance. Experiments on biomedical reasoning tasks show that AutoPipe consistently outperforms offline-only baselines and achieves comparable performance with the strongest online HPO baselines while using less than 10\% of their computational cost.
title_zh: 大语言模型后训练流水线的自动配置
abstract_zh: 结合监督微调与强化学习的大型语言模型（LLM）后训练流程在实际计算预算下难以配置：其配置空间维度高且异质性强，各阶段间耦合紧密，而每次端到端评估成本高昂。我们提出 AutoPipe，一种面向预算约束的两阶段框架，用于 LLM 后训练中的配置选择。离线阶段，AutoPipe 从历史运行数据中学习一个基于数据集的“学习排序”代理模型，捕捉数据集内部的偏好信息，并为配置空间中潜在的优质区域提供可迁移的指导。在线阶段，针对新数据集，AutoPipe 利用离线阶段获得的指导来引导贝叶斯优化，并通过高斯过程残差代理模型建模数据集特有的偏差。为降低评估开销，每个试验均采用早期停止策略，并由一个学习得到的预测器进行评分，该预测器将早期训练信号映射为最终后训练性能的低成本代理指标。在生物医学推理任务上的实验表明，AutoPipe 始终优于仅离线的基线方法，在性能上可媲美最强的在线超参数优化（HPO）基线，同时计算成本不足其 10%。

title: Green Architectural Tactics in ML-enabled Systems: An LLM-based Repository Mining Study
authors: Vincenzo De Martino, Silverio Martínez-Fernández, Fabio Palomba
abstract: Context: The increasing adoption of machine learning (ML) and artificial intelligence (AI) technologies raises growing concerns about their environmental sustainability. Developing and deploying ML-enabled systems is computationally intensive, particularly during training and inference. Green AI has emerged to address these issues by promoting efficiency without sacrificing accuracy. While prior research has proposed catalogs of sustainable practices (i.e., green tactics), there remains limited understanding of their adoption in practice and whether additional, undocumented tactics exist. Objective: This study aims to investigate the extent to which existing sustainable practices are implemented in real-world ML-enabled systems and to identify previously undocumented practices that support environmental sustainability. Method: We conduct a mining software repository study on 205 open-source ML projects on GitHub. To support our analysis, we design a novel mechanism based on large language models (LLMs) capable of identifying both known and new sustainable practices from code repositories. Results: Our findings confirm that green tactics reported in the literature are used in practice, although adoption rates vary. Furthermore, our LLM-based approach reveals nine previously undocumented sustainable practices. Each tactic is supported with code examples to aid adoption and integration. Conclusions: We finally provide insights for practitioners seeking to reduce the environmental impact of ML-enabled systems and offer a foundation for future research in automating the detection and adoption of sustainable practices.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的仓库挖掘研究：面向ML系统中的绿色建筑策略
abstract_zh:
随着机器学习（ML）和人工智能（AI）技术的日益普及，其环境可持续性问题引发了越来越多的关注。开发和部署ML系统在计算上极为密集，尤其是在训练和推理阶段。为应对这些问题，“绿色AI”应运而生，旨在通过提升效率来实现环境友好，同时不牺牲模型的准确性。尽管已有研究提出了一系列可持续实践（即“绿色策略”），但这些策略在实际中的采纳情况仍缺乏深入理解，且可能存在尚未被记录的其他有效方法。  

研究目标：本研究旨在探究现有可持续实践在真实世界ML系统中的实际应用程度，并识别此前未被记录的、有助于环境可持续性的新实践。  

研究方法：我们对GitHub上205个开源ML项目进行了代码仓库挖掘分析。为支持分析，我们设计了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的新机制，能够从代码仓库中识别出已知及全新的可持续实践。  

研究结果：我们的发现证实，文献中报道的绿色策略确实在实践中被采用，但采纳率存在差异。此外，基于LLM的方法揭示了九种此前未被记录的可持续实践。每项策略均配有具体的代码示例，以帮助开发者更好地理解和应用。  

研究结论：本文为希望降低ML系统环境影响的从业者提供了实用洞见，并为未来研究中自动化检测与推广可持续实践奠定了基础。

title: Learning to Self-Evolve
authors: Xiaoyin Chen, Canwen Xu, Yite Wang, Boyi Liu, Zhewei Yao, Yuxiong He
abstract: We introduce Learning to Self-Evolve (LSE), a reinforcement learning framework that trains large language models (LLMs) to improve their own contexts at test time. We situate LSE in the setting of test-time self-evolution, where a model iteratively refines its context from feedback on seen problems to perform better on new ones. Existing approaches rely entirely on the inherent reasoning ability of the model and never explicitly train it for this task. LSE reduces the multi-step evolution problem to a single-step RL objective, where each context edit is rewarded by the improvement in downstream performance. We pair this objective with a tree-guided evolution loop. On Text-to-SQL generation (BIRD) and general question answering (MMLU-Redux), a 4B-parameter model trained with LSE outperforms self-evolving policies powered by GPT-5 and Claude Sonnet 4.5, as well as prompt optimization methods including GEPA and TextGrad, and transfers to guide other models without additional training. Our results highlight the effectiveness of treating self-evolution as a learnable skill.
title_zh: 学会自我进化
abstract_zh: 我们提出了“学习自我进化”（Learning to Self-Evolve, LSE），这是一种强化学习框架，旨在训练大型语言模型（LLMs）在测试时自主优化自身上下文。我们将LSE置于测试时自我进化的情境中，即模型通过针对已见问题的反馈，迭代地改进其上下文，从而在面对新问题时表现更佳。现有方法完全依赖模型自身的推理能力，从未显式地为此任务进行训练。LSE将多步进化问题简化为单步强化学习目标，其中每次上下文修改都会因其对下游性能的提升而获得奖励。我们结合树状引导的演化循环来实现这一目标。在Text-to-SQL生成（BIRD）和通用问答任务（MMLU-Redux）上，一个经过LSE训练的40亿参数模型，其表现超越了基于GPT-5和Claude Sonnet 4.5的自进化策略，以及GEPA和TextGrad等提示优化方法，并且无需额外训练即可迁移至指导其他模型。我们的结果凸显了将自我进化视为可学习技能的有效性。

title: UT-ACA: Uncertainty-Triggered Adaptive Context Allocation for Long-Context Inference
authors: Lang Zhou, Shuxuan Li, Zhuohao Li, Shi Liu, Zhilin Zhao, Wei-Shi Zheng
abstract: Long-context inference remains challenging for large language models due to attention dilution and out-of-distribution degradation. Context selection mitigates this limitation by attending to a subset of key-value cache entries, yet most methods allocate a fixed context budget throughout decoding despite highly non-uniform token-level contextual demands. To address this issue, we propose Uncertainty-Triggered Adaptive Context Allocation (UT-ACA), an inference-time framework that dynamically adjusts the context window based on token-wise uncertainty. UT-ACA learns an uncertainty detector that combines semantic embeddings with logit-based confidence while accounting for uncertainty accumulation across decoding steps. When insufficient evidence is indicated, UT-ACA selectively rolls back, expands the context window, and regenerates the token with additional support. Experiments show that UT-ACA substantially reduces average context usage while preserving generation quality in long-context settings.
title_zh: UT-ACA：面向长上下文推理的不确定性触发自适应上下文分配
abstract_zh: 长上下文推理对大型语言模型而言仍具挑战性，主要源于注意力稀释和分布外性能退化问题。上下文选择通过仅关注键值缓存中的部分关键条目来缓解这一限制，但大多数方法在解码过程中始终分配固定的上下文预算，而未考虑不同词元层面的上下文需求存在高度非均匀性。为解决此问题，我们提出不确定性触发的自适应上下文分配（UT-ACA），这是一种推理时框架，能够根据词元级别的不确定性动态调整上下文窗口。UT-ACA学习一个不确定性检测器，该检测器结合语义嵌入与基于logit的置信度，并考虑解码步骤中不确定性累积的影响。当系统检测到证据不足时，UT-ACA会主动回滚、扩展上下文窗口，并利用额外支持重新生成该词元。实验表明，UT-ACA在保持长上下文生成质量的同时，显著降低了平均上下文使用量。

title: AS2 -- Attention-Based Soft Answer Sets: An End-to-End Differentiable Neuro-Soft-Symbolic Reasoning Architecture
authors: Wael AbdAlmageed
abstract: Neuro-symbolic artificial intelligence (AI) systems typically couple a neural perception module to a discrete symbolic solver through a non-differentiable boundary, preventing constraint-satisfaction feedback from reaching the perception encoder during training. We introduce AS2 (Attention-Based Soft Answer Sets), a fully differentiable neuro-symbolic architecture that replaces the discrete solver with a soft, continuous approximation of the Answer Set Programming (ASP) immediate consequence operator $T_P$. AS2 maintains per-position probability distributions over a finite symbol domain throughout the forward pass and trains end-to-end by minimizing the fixed-point residual of a probabilistic lift of $T_P$, thereby differentiating through the constraint check without invoking an external solver at either training or inference time. The architecture is entirely free of conventional positional embeddings. Instead, it encodes problem structure through constraint-group membership embeddings that directly reflect the declarative ASP specification, making the model agnostic to arbitrary position indexing. On Visual Sudoku, AS2 achieves 99.89% cell accuracy and 100% constraint satisfaction (verified by Clingo) across 1,000 test boards, using a greedy constrained decoding procedure that requires no external solver. On MNIST Addition with $N \in \{2, 4, 8\}$ addends, AS2 achieves digit accuracy above 99.7% across all scales. These results demonstrate that a soft differentiable fixpoint operator, combined with constraint-aware attention and declarative constraint specification, can match or exceed pipeline and solver-based neuro-symbolic systems while maintaining full end-to-end differentiability.
title_zh: AS2——基于注意力的软答案集：一种端到端可微的神经-软符号推理架构
abstract_zh: 神经符号人工智能（AI）系统通常通过一个不可微的边界将神经感知模块与离散符号求解器耦合，导致约束满足反馈无法在训练过程中传递至感知编码器。我们提出AS2（基于注意力的软答案集），一种完全可微的神经符号架构，该架构用Answer Set Programming（ASP）即时结论算子 $T_P$ 的软连续近似替代了传统的离散求解器。AS2在前向传播过程中始终对有限符号域保持每个位置的概率分布，并通过最小化 $T_P$ 的概率推广形式的固定点残差实现端到端训练，从而在不调用外部求解器的情况下，实现对约束检查的可微处理，既适用于训练也适用于推理阶段。该架构完全摒弃了传统的位置嵌入方式，转而通过反映声明式ASP规范的约束组成员嵌入来编码问题结构，使模型对任意位置索引无关。在Visual Sudoku任务中，AS2在1,000个测试棋盘上实现了99.89%的单元格准确率和100%的约束满足率（经Clingo验证），仅使用一种无需外部求解器的贪心约束解码方法。在MNIST加法任务中，当加数数量 $N \in \{2, 4, 8\}$ 时，AS2在所有尺度下均达到超过99.7%的数字准确率。这些结果表明，结合约束感知注意力机制与声明式约束规范的软可微不动点算子，能够达到甚至超越传统流水线式或依赖求解器的神经符号系统性能，同时保持全程端到端可微性。

title: Where are the Hidden Gems? Applying Transformer Models for Design Discussion Detection
authors: Lawrence Arkoh, Daniel Feitosa, Wesley K. G. Assunção
abstract: Design decisions are at the core of software engineering and appear in Q\&A forums, mailing lists, pull requests, issue trackers, and commit messages. Design discussions spanning a project's history provide valuable information for informed decision-making, such as refactoring and software modernization. Machine learning techniques have been used to detect design decisions in natural language discussions; however, their effectiveness is limited by the scarcity of labeled data and the high cost of annotation. Prior work adopted cross-domain strategies with traditional classifiers, training on one domain and testing on another. Despite their success, transformer-based models, which often outperform traditional methods, remain largely unexplored in this setting. The goal of this work is to investigate the performance of transformer-based models (i.e., BERT, RoBERTa, XLNet, LaMini-Flan-T5-77M, and ChatGPT-4o-mini) for detecting design-related discussions. To this end, we conduct a conceptual replication of prior cross-domain studies while extending them with modern transformer architectures and addressing methodological issues in earlier work. The models were fine-tuned on Stack Overflow and evaluated on GitHub artifacts (i.e., pull requests, issues, and commits). BERT and RoBERTa show strong recall across domains, while XLNet achieves higher precision but lower recall. ChatGPT-4o-mini yields the highest recall and competitive overall performance, whereas LaMini-Flan-T5-77M provides a lightweight alternative with stronger precision but less balanced performance. We also evaluated similar-word injection for data augmentation, but unlike prior findings, it did not yield meaningful improvements. Overall, these results highlight both the opportunities and trade-offs of using modern language models for detecting design discussion.
title_zh: 隐藏的瑰宝在哪里？基于Transformer模型的设计讨论检测
abstract_zh:
设计决策是软件工程的核心，广泛出现在问答论坛、邮件列表、拉取请求、问题追踪系统以及提交记录中。贯穿项目历史的设计讨论为重构和软件现代化等决策提供了宝贵信息。已有研究采用机器学习技术从自然语言讨论中检测设计决策，但其效果受限于标注数据稀缺以及人工标注成本高昂的问题。以往工作多采用跨领域策略，使用传统分类器在某一领域进行训练并在另一领域进行测试。尽管这些方法取得了一定成功，但性能通常优于传统方法的基于Transformer的模型在此类任务中仍鲜有探索。

本研究旨在探究基于Transformer的模型（即BERT、RoBERTa、XLNet、LaMini-Flan-T5-77M以及ChatGPT-4o-mini）在识别设计相关讨论中的表现。为此，我们对先前的跨领域研究进行了概念性复现，并引入了现代Transformer架构，同时修正了早期研究中存在的方法学缺陷。模型在Stack Overflow上进行微调，并在GitHub相关资源（包括拉取请求、问题和提交记录）上进行评估。实验结果表明，BERT与RoBERTa在跨领域场景下表现出较强的召回率，而XLNet虽具有更高的精确率，但召回率相对较低；ChatGPT-4o-mini则实现了最高的召回率，并展现出具有竞争力的整体性能；LaMini-Flan-T5-77M作为一个轻量级替代方案，具备更强的精确率，但整体表现不够均衡。

此外，我们还评估了同义词注入作为数据增强手段的效果，但与先前研究发现不同，该方法并未带来显著的性能提升。总体而言，这些结果揭示了在设计讨论检测任务中使用现代语言模型所蕴含的机遇与权衡。

title: AutORAN: LLM-driven Natural Language Programming for Agile xApp Development
authors: Xin Li, Shiming Yu, Leming Shen, Jianing Zhang, Yuanqing Zheng, Yaxiong Xie
abstract: Traditional RAN systems are closed and monolithic, stifling innovation. The openness and programmability enabled by Open Radio Access Network (O-RAN) are envisioned to revolutionize cellular networks with control-plane applications--xApps. The development of xApps (typically by third-party developers), however, remains time-consuming and cumbersome, often requiring months of manual coding and integration, which hinders the roll-out of new functionalities in practice. To lower the barrier of xApp development for both developers and network operators, we present AutORAN, the first LLM-driven natural language programming framework for agile xApps that automates the entire xApp development pipeline. In a nutshell, AutORAN turns high-level user intents into swiftly deployable xApps within minutes, eliminating the need for manual coding or testing. To this end, AutORAN builds a fully automated xApp generation pipeline, which integrates multiple functional modules (from user requirement elicitation, AI/ML function design and validation, to xApp synthesis and deployment). We design, implement, and comprehensively evaluate AutORAN on representative xApp tasks. Results show AutORAN-generated xApps can achieve similar or even better performance than the best known hand-crafted baselines. AutORAN drastically accelerates the xApp development cycle (from user intent elicitation to roll-out), streamlining O-RAN innovation.
title_zh: AutORAN：基于大语言模型的自然语言编程在敏捷xApp开发中的应用
abstract_zh: 传统无线接入网（RAN）系统封闭且架构僵化，严重制约了创新。开放无线接入网（O-RAN）所赋予的开放性与可编程性，有望通过控制面应用——xApps，彻底革新蜂窝网络。然而，xApps的开发（通常由第三方开发者完成）仍耗时费力，往往需要数月的手动编码与集成工作，这在实践中严重阻碍了新功能的快速部署。为降低开发者和网络运营商在xApp开发方面的门槛，我们提出AutORAN——首个基于大语言模型（LLM）的自然语言编程框架，能够实现敏捷xApps的自动化开发，全面覆盖xApp开发全流程。简而言之，AutORAN可在数分钟内将高层次用户意图转化为可快速部署的xApps，完全无需手动编码或测试。为此，AutORAN构建了一个全自动化xApp生成流水线，集成了多个功能模块，涵盖用户需求获取、AI/ML功能设计与验证、xApp合成与部署等环节。我们设计、实现并全面评估了AutORAN在典型xApp任务上的表现。实验结果表明，AutORAN生成的xApps在性能上可达到甚至超越现有最优的手工编写基线。AutORAN显著加速了从用户意图识别到功能上线的整个xApp开发周期，极大推动了O-RAN生态的创新进程。

title: Expert Personas Improve LLM Alignment but Damage Accuracy: Bootstrapping Intent-Based Persona Routing with PRISM
authors: Zizhao Hu, Mohammad Rostami, Jesse Thomason
abstract: Persona prompting can steer LLM generation towards a domain-specific tone and pattern. This behavior enables use cases in multi-agent systems where diverse interactions are crucial and human-centered tasks require high-level human alignment. Prior works provide mixed opinions on their utility: some report performance gains when using expert personas for certain domains and their contribution to data diversity in synthetic data creation, while others find near-zero or negative impact on general utility. To fully leverage the benefits of the LLM persona and avoid its harmfulness, a more comprehensive investigation of the mechanism is crucial. In this work, we study how model optimization, task type, prompt length, and placement can impact expert persona effectiveness across instruction-tuned and reasoning LLMs, and provide insight into conditions under which expert personas fail and succeed. Based on our findings, we developed a pipeline to fully leverage the benefits of an expert persona, named PRISM (Persona Routing via Intent-based Self-Modeling), which self-distills an intent-conditioned expert persona into a gated LoRA adapter through a bootstrapping process that requires no external data, models, or knowledge. PRISM enhances human preference and safety alignment on generative tasks while maintaining accuracy on discriminative tasks across all models, with minimal memory and computing overhead.
title_zh: 专家型角色提升大模型对齐性但损害准确性：基于PRISM的意图驱动角色路由自举方法
abstract_zh:
角色提示（Persona prompting）能够引导大语言模型（LLM）生成具有特定领域风格和模式的内容。这种行为在多智能体系统中尤为关键，因为多样化的交互是其核心需求；同时，在以人类为中心的任务中，实现高水平的人类对齐也至关重要。然而，先前的研究对角色提示的有效性存在分歧：部分研究发现，在特定领域使用专家角色提示可带来性能提升，并有助于合成数据生成中的数据多样性；而另一些研究则指出其对通用能力的影响几乎为零，甚至可能产生负面效果。为了充分挖掘角色提示的潜力并规避其潜在危害，深入探究其作用机制显得尤为必要。

在本研究中，我们系统考察了模型优化方式、任务类型、提示长度以及提示位置等因素如何影响专家角色提示在指令微调型与推理型大语言模型中的有效性，并揭示了角色提示在何种条件下会成功或失效。基于这些发现，我们提出了一种名为 PRISM（基于意图自建模型的角色路由，Persona Routing via Intent-based Self-Modeling）的全新流水线方法，该方法通过无需外部数据、模型或知识的自举过程，将意图条件化的专家角色提示自蒸馏为一个门控LoRA适配器。PRISM 在各类模型上均显著提升了生成任务中的人类偏好契合度与安全性对齐水平，同时保持了判别任务的准确性，且仅需极低的内存与计算开销。

title: Cross-Domain Demo-to-Code via Neurosymbolic Counterfactual Reasoning
authors: Jooyoung Kim, Wonje Choi, Younguk Song, Honguk Woo
abstract: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have enabled video-instructed robotic programming, allowing agents to interpret video demonstrations and generate executable control code. We formulate video-instructed robotic programming as a cross-domain adaptation problem, where perceptual and physical differences between demonstration and deployment induce procedural mismatches. However, current VLMs lack the procedural understanding needed to reformulate causal dependencies and achieve task-compatible behavior under such domain shifts. We introduce NeSyCR, a neurosymbolic counterfactual reasoning framework that enables verifiable adaptation of task procedures, providing a reliable synthesis of code policies. NeSyCR abstracts video demonstrations into symbolic trajectories that capture the underlying task procedure. Given deployment observations, it derives counterfactual states that reveal cross-domain incompatibilities. By exploring the symbolic state space with verifiable checks, NeSyCR proposes procedural revisions that restore compatibility with the demonstrated procedure. NeSyCR achieves a 31.14% improvement in task success over the strongest baseline Statler, showing robust cross-domain adaptation across both simulated and real-world manipulation tasks.
title_zh: 通过神经符号反事实推理实现跨域演示到代码的转换
abstract_zh: 视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的最新进展使得视频指导的机器人编程成为可能，使智能体能够理解视频演示并生成可执行的控制代码。我们将视频指导的机器人编程问题形式化为一个跨域适应问题，其中演示与部署阶段之间的感知和物理差异会导致程序行为不匹配。然而，现有的VLMs缺乏必要的程序理解能力，无法重构因果关系，在此类域偏移下难以实现任务兼容的行为。为此，我们提出了NeSyCR——一种神经符号反事实推理框架，能够实现可验证的任务程序适应，从而可靠地合成代码策略。NeSyCR将视频演示抽象为捕捉底层任务流程的符号轨迹。在给定部署阶段观测数据的情况下，它推导出反事实状态，揭示跨域不相容性。通过在符号状态空间中进行可验证检查的探索，NeSyCR提出程序修订方案，以恢复与原始演示程序的兼容性。在模拟和真实世界操作任务中，NeSyCR相较于最强基线方法Statler实现了31.14%的任务成功率提升，展现出强大的跨域适应能力。

title: Memento-Skills: Let Agents Design Agents
authors: Huichi Zhou, Siyuan Guo, Anjie Liu, Zhongwei Yu, Ziqin Gong, Bowen Zhao, Zhixun Chen, Menglong Zhang, Yihang Chen, Jinsong Li, Runyu Yang, Qiangbin Liu, Xinlei Yu, Jianmin Zhou, Na Wang, Chunyang Sun, Jun Wang
abstract: We introduce \emph{Memento-Skills}, a generalist, continually-learnable LLM agent system that functions as an \emph{agent-designing agent}: it autonomously constructs, adapts, and improves task-specific agents through experience. The system is built on a memory-based reinforcement learning framework with \emph{stateful prompts}, where reusable skills (stored as structured markdown files) serve as persistent, evolving memory. These skills encode both behaviour and context, enabling the agent to carry forward knowledge across interactions. Starting from simple elementary skills (like Web search and terminal operations), the agent continually improves via the \emph{Read--Write Reflective Learning} mechanism introduced in \emph{Memento~2}~\cite{wang2025memento2}. In the \emph{read} phase, a behaviour-trainable skill router selects the most relevant skill conditioned on the current stateful prompt; in the \emph{write} phase, the agent updates and expands its skill library based on new experience. This closed-loop design enables \emph{continual learning without updating LLM parameters}, as all adaptation is realised through the evolution of externalised skills and prompts. Unlike prior approaches that rely on human-designed agents, Memento-Skills enables a generalist agent to \emph{design agents end-to-end} for new tasks. Through iterative skill generation and refinement, the system progressively improves its own capabilities. Experiments on the \emph{General AI Assistants} benchmark and \emph{Humanity's Last Exam} demonstrate sustained gains, achieving 26.2\% and 116.2\% relative improvements in overall accuracy, respectively. Code is available at https://github.com/Memento-Teams/Memento-Skills.
title_zh: 记忆-技能：让代理设计代理
abstract_zh:
我们提出了一种名为 \emph{Memento-Skills} 的通用、可持续学习的大型语言模型（LLM）智能体系统，该系统作为“智能体设计者”运行：它能够自主构建、适应并改进针对特定任务的智能体，整个过程基于经验不断演进。该系统建立在基于记忆的强化学习框架之上，采用 \emph{有状态提示（stateful prompts）}，其中可复用的技能（以结构化 Markdown 文件形式存储）充当持久且不断进化的记忆。这些技能不仅编码行为，还包含上下文信息，使智能体能够在不同交互之间持续传递知识。

系统从基础的初级技能（如网络搜索和终端操作）开始，通过 \emph{Memento~2}~\cite{wang2025memento2} 提出的 \emph{读—写反思学习机制} 实现持续优化。在 \emph{读} 阶段，一个行为可训练的技能路由模块根据当前的有状态提示选择最相关的技能；在 \emph{写} 阶段，智能体根据新获得的经验更新并扩展其技能库。这种闭环设计使得系统能够在不更新 LLM 参数的前提下实现 \emph{持续学习}，所有适应性改进均通过外部技能与提示的演化来完成。

与以往依赖人工设计智能体的方法不同，Memento-Skills 使通用型智能体能够 \emph{端到端地为新任务自主设计智能体}。通过迭代生成与精炼技能，系统逐步提升自身的综合能力。在 \emph{通用人工智能助手} 基准测试和 \emph{人类最后的考试}（Humanity's Last Exam）中的实验表明，系统实现了持续性能提升，分别在整体准确率上取得了 26.2% 和 116.2% 的相对提升。代码已开源，地址为 https://github.com/Memento-Teams/Memento-Skills。

title: Weaver: Fuzzing JavaScript Engines at the JavaScript-WebAssembly Boundary
authors: Lingming Zhang, Binbin Zhao, Puzhuo Liu, Qinge Xie, Peng Di, Jianhai Chen, Shouling Ji
abstract: The security of modern JavaScript (JS) engines is critical since they provide the primary defense mechanism for executing untrusted code on the web. The recent integration of WebAssembly (Wasm) has transformed these engines into complex polyglot environments, creating a novel attack surface at the JS-Wasm interaction boundary due to the distinct type systems and memory models of two languages. This boundary remains largely underexplored, as previous works mainly focus on testing JS and Wasm as two isolated entities rather than investigating the security implications of their cross-language interactions. This paper proposes Weaver, an effective greybox fuzzing framework specifically tailored to uncover vulnerabilities at the JS-Wasm boundary. To comply with the language constraints, Weaver uses a type-aware generation strategy, meticulously maintaining the dual-type representation for every generated variables. This allows fuzzer to validly utilize variables across the language boundary. Besides, Weaver leverages the UCB-1 algorithm to intelligently schedule mutators and generators to maximize the discovery of new code paths. We have implemented and evaluated Weaver on three JS engines. The results indicate that Weaver achieves superior code coverage compared to state-of-the-art fuzzers. Moreover, Weaver has uncovered two new bugs in the latest versions of these engines, one of which is considered high severity and set to highest priority, demonstrating the practicality of Weaver.
title_zh: 编织者：在 JavaScript 与 WebAssembly 边界处 fuzzing JavaScript 引擎
abstract_zh: 现代JavaScript（JS）引擎的安全性至关重要，因为它们是执行网络上不受信任代码的主要防御机制。近年来，WebAssembly（Wasm）的集成使这些引擎演变为复杂的多语言环境，由于JS与Wasm在类型系统和内存模型上的显著差异，在两者交互边界处形成了全新的攻击面。然而，这一边界仍鲜有研究，以往的工作大多将JS和Wasm视为独立实体进行测试，而未深入探讨二者跨语言交互带来的安全影响。本文提出Weaver——一种专门针对JS-Wasm交互边界设计的有效灰盒模糊测试框架，旨在发现该区域中的潜在漏洞。为满足语言约束，Weaver采用类型感知的生成策略，对每个生成变量精确维护其双类型表示，从而确保跨语言边界时变量的合法使用。此外，Weaver利用UCB-1算法智能调度变异器和生成器，以最大化新代码路径的发现效率。我们在三个主流JavaScript引擎上实现了Weaver并进行了评估，结果表明，与当前最先进的模糊测试工具相比，Weaver在代码覆盖率方面表现更优。更重要的是，Weaver在最新版本的这些引擎中发现了两个新漏洞，其中一个被评定为高危级别，列为最高优先级修复，充分证明了Weaver的实际应用价值。

title: Act While Thinking: Accelerating LLM Agents via Pattern-Aware Speculative Tool Execution
authors: Yifan Sui, Han Zhao, Rui Ma, Zhiyuan He, Hao Wang, Jianxun Li, Yuqing Yang
abstract: LLM-powered agents are emerging as a dominant paradigm for autonomous task solving. Unlike standard inference workloads, agents operate in a strictly serial "LLM-tool" loop, where the LLM must wait for external tool execution at every step. This execution model introduces severe latency bottlenecks. To address this problem, we propose PASTE, a Pattern-Aware Speculative Tool Execution method designed to hide tool latency through speculation. PASTE is based on the insight that although agent requests are semantically diverse, they exhibit stable application level control flows (recurring tool-call sequences) and predictable data dependencies (parameter passing between tools). By exploiting these properties, PASTE improves agent serving performance through speculative tool execution. Experimental results against state of the art baselines show that PASTE reduces average task completion time by 48.5% and improves tool execution throughput by 1.8x.
title_zh: 思考中执行：通过模式感知的推测性工具执行加速大语言模型代理
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体正逐渐成为自主任务求解的主流范式。与传统的推理工作负载不同，智能体在执行过程中遵循严格的“LLM-工具”串行循环：在每一步中，LLM都必须等待外部工具的执行结果才能继续。这种执行模式带来了严重的延迟瓶颈。为解决这一问题，我们提出了PASTE——一种模式感知的推测性工具执行方法，旨在通过推测性执行来隐藏工具调用带来的延迟。PASTE的核心洞察在于：尽管智能体请求在语义上各不相同，但其应用层控制流具有高度稳定性（即重复出现的工具调用序列），且数据依赖关系也具有可预测性（如工具间参数传递规律）。利用这些特性，PASTE通过推测性地提前执行工具调用，显著提升了智能体服务性能。实验结果表明，相较于当前最先进的基线方法，PASTE将平均任务完成时间降低了48.5%，同时将工具执行吞吐量提升了1.8倍。

title: Implicit Patterns in LLM-Based Binary Analysis
authors: Qiang Li, XiangRui Zhang, Haining Wang
abstract: Binary vulnerability analysis is increasingly performed by LLM-based agents in an iterative, multi-pass manner, with the model as the core decision-maker. However, how such systems organize exploration over hundreds of reasoning steps remains poorly understood, due to limited context windows and implicit token-level behaviors. We present the first large-scale, trace-level study showing that multi-pass LLM reasoning gives rise to structured, token-level implicit patterns. Analyzing 521 binaries with 99,563 reasoning steps, we identify four dominant patterns: early pruning, path-dependent lock-in, targeted backtracking, and knowledge-guided prioritization that emerge implicitly from reasoning traces. These token-level implicit patterns serve as an abstraction of LLM reasoning: instead of explicit control-flow or predefined heuristics, exploration is organized through implicit decisions regulating path selection, commitment, and revision. Our analysis shows these patterns form a stable, structured system with distinct temporal roles and measurable characteristics. Our results provide the first systematic characterization of LLM-driven binary analysis and a foundation for more reliable analysis systems.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型的二进制分析中的隐含模式
abstract_zh: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的二进制漏洞分析正越来越多地采用迭代、多轮推理的方式进行，其中模型作为核心决策者。然而，由于上下文窗口有限以及令牌层面行为的隐含性，这类系统如何在数百次推理步骤中组织探索过程仍不清晰。本文首次开展大规模、基于追踪级别的研究，揭示了多轮LLM推理会催生出结构化的、令牌层面的隐含模式。通过对521个二进制文件、共计99,563次推理步骤的分析，我们识别出四种主导性模式：早期剪枝、路径依赖性锁定、目标导向回溯以及知识引导的优先级排序。这些令牌层面的隐含模式构成了LLM推理的一种抽象表达：探索行为并非依赖显式的控制流或预设启发式规则，而是通过隐式决策来调节路径选择、承诺与修正。我们的分析表明，这些模式共同构成一个稳定且结构化的系统，具有明确的时间角色和可度量的特征。本研究首次系统地刻画了由LLM驱动的二进制分析过程，为构建更可靠、可预测的分析系统奠定了基础。

title: Security awareness in LLM agents: the NDAI zone case
authors: Enrico Bottazzi, Pia Park
abstract: NDAI zones let inventor and investor agents negotiate inside a Trusted Execution Environment (TEE) where any disclosed information is deleted if no deal is reached. This makes full IP disclosure the rational strategy for the inventor's agent. Leveraging this infrastructure, however, requires agents to distinguish a secure environment from an insecure one, a capability LLM agents lack natively, since they can rely only on evidence passed through the context window to form awareness of their execution environment. We ask: How do different LLM models weight various forms of evidence when forming awareness of the security of their execution environment? Using an NDAI-style negotiation task across 10 language models and various evidence scenarios, we find a clear asymmetry: a failing attestation universally suppresses disclosure across all models, whereas a passing attestation produces highly heterogeneous responses: some models increase disclosure, others are unaffected, and a few paradoxically reduce it. This reveals that current LLM models can reliably detect danger signals but cannot reliably verify safety, the very capability required for privacy-preserving agentic protocols such as NDAI zones. Bridging this gap, possibly through interpretability analysis, targeted fine-tuning, or improved evidence architectures, remains the central open challenge for deploying agents that calibrate information sharing to actual evidence quality.
title_zh: 大语言模型代理中的安全意识：NDAI区域案例
abstract_zh: NDAI区域允许发明者和投资者代理在可信执行环境（TEE）内进行协商，任何披露的信息若未达成协议将被自动删除。这使得发明者代理采取完全披露知识产权的策略成为理性选择。然而，要利用这一基础设施，代理必须能够区分安全环境与不安全环境——而当前大语言模型（LLM）代理天生缺乏这种能力，因为它们只能依赖上下文窗口传递的证据来形成对自身执行环境的认知。我们提出问题：不同LLM模型在形成对执行环境安全性认知时，如何权衡各种形式的证据？通过在10种语言模型上开展类NDAI协商任务，并设置多种证据情境，我们发现存在显著的不对称性：无论何种模型，只要认证失败，披露行为都会被普遍抑制；而认证通过时，各模型反应则高度分化：部分模型增加披露，部分保持不变，少数甚至出现悖论性地减少披露。这一结果揭示出，当前LLM模型能够可靠识别危险信号，却无法可靠验证安全性——而这正是实现如NDAI区域等隐私保护型智能体协议所必需的核心能力。弥合这一差距，可能需借助可解释性分析、针对性微调或更优的证据架构设计，仍是部署能根据实际证据质量精准调控信息共享行为的智能体所面临的首要开放挑战。

title: PlanTwin: Privacy-Preserving Planning Abstractions for Cloud-Assisted LLM Agents
authors: Guangsheng Yu, Qin Wang, Rui Lang, Shuai Su, Xu Wang
abstract: Cloud-hosted large language models (LLMs) have become the de facto planners in agentic systems, coordinating tools and guiding execution over local environments. In many deployments, however, the environment being planned over is private, containing source code, files, credentials, and metadata that cannot be exposed to the cloud. Existing solutions address adjacent concerns, such as execution isolation, access control, or confidential inference, but they do not control what cloud planners observe during planning: within the permitted scope, \textit{raw environment state is still exposed}. We introduce PlanTwin, a privacy-preserving architecture for cloud-assisted planning without exposing raw local context. The key idea is to project the real environment into a \textit{planning-oriented digital twin}: a schema-constrained and de-identified abstract graph that preserves planning-relevant structure while removing reconstructable details. The cloud planner operates solely on this sanitized twin through a bounded capability interface, while a local gatekeeper enforces safety policies and cumulative disclosure budgets. We further formalize the privacy-utility trade-off as a capability granularity problem, define architectural privacy goals using $(k,δ)$-anonymity and $ε$-unlinkability, and mitigate compositional leakage through multi-turn disclosure control. We implement PlanTwin as middleware between local agents and cloud planners and evaluate it on 60 agentic tasks across ten domains with four cloud planners. PlanTwin achieves full sensitive-item non-disclosure (SND = 1.0) while maintaining planning quality close to full-context systems: three of four planners achieve PQS $> 0.79$, and the full pipeline incurs less than 2.2\% utility loss.
title_zh: PlanTwin：面向云辅助大语言模型代理的隐私保护规划抽象
abstract_zh:
云托管的大语言模型（LLMs）已成为智能体系统中的事实标准规划器，负责协调工具并指导本地环境中的执行。然而，在许多部署场景中，所规划的环境是私有的，包含源代码、文件、凭证和元数据等敏感信息，这些内容无法暴露给云端。现有的解决方案虽然解决了部分相关问题，如执行隔离、访问控制或机密推理，但并未控制云规划器在规划过程中所能观察到的内容：即使在允许的范围内，**原始环境状态仍然会被暴露**。为此，我们提出了PlanTwin——一种无需暴露本地原始上下文即可实现云端辅助规划的隐私保护架构。

其核心思想是将真实环境投影为一个**面向规划的数字孪生**：一种受模式约束且去标识化的抽象图结构，能够在保留规划相关结构的同时，消除可重构的细节信息。云规划器仅通过一个能力受限的接口在该经过净化的孪生环境中操作，而本地网关则负责执行安全策略和累积披露预算控制。

我们进一步将隐私-效用权衡形式化为能力粒度问题，采用$(k,δ)$-匿名性和$ε$-不可链接性来定义架构的隐私目标，并通过多轮披露控制机制缓解组合泄露风险。我们将PlanTwin实现为本地智能体与云端规划器之间的中间件，在十个领域共60个智能体任务上进行了评估，使用了四种不同的云规划器。实验结果表明，PlanTwin实现了对敏感信息的完全非披露（SND = 1.0），同时保持了接近全上下文系统的规划质量：四款规划器中有三款的规划质量得分（PQS）超过0.79，整个流水线的效用损失低于2.2%。

title: Hypothesis-Conditioned Query Rewriting for Decision-Useful Retrieval
authors: Hangeol Chang, Changsun Lee, Seungjoon Rho, Junho Yeo, Jong Chul Ye
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) improves Large Language Models (LLMs) by grounding generation in external, non-parametric knowledge. However, when a task requires choosing among competing options, simply grounding generation in broadly relevant context is often insufficient to drive the final decision. Existing RAG methods typically rely on a single initial query, which often favors topical relevance over decision-relevant evidence, and therefore retrieves background information that can fail to discriminate among answer options. To address this issue, here we propose Hypothesis-Conditioned Query Rewriting (HCQR), a training-free pre-retrieval framework that reorients RAG from topic-oriented retrieval to evidence-oriented retrieval. HCQR first derives a lightweight working hypothesis from the input question and candidate options, and then rewrites retrieval into three targeted queries that seek evidence to: (1) support the hypothesis, (2) distinguish it from competing alternatives, and (3) verify salient clues in the question. This approach enables context retrieval that is more directly aligned with answer selection, allowing the generator to confirm or overturn the initial hypothesis based on the retrieved evidence. Experiments on MedQA and MMLU-Med show that HCQR consistently outperforms single-query RAG and re-rank/filter baselines, improving average accuracy over Simple RAG by 5.9 and 3.6 points, respectively. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/HCQR-1C2E.
title_zh: 假设条件查询重写以实现决策有用的信息检索
abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）通过将大语言模型（LLMs）的生成过程与外部非参数化知识相结合，提升了模型的表现。然而，当任务需要在多个竞争选项中进行选择时，仅依赖广泛相关的上下文信息往往不足以推动最终决策。现有的RAG方法通常依赖单一初始查询，这种做法往往更注重主题相关性而非决策相关证据，导致检索到的背景信息难以有效区分不同答案选项。为解决这一问题，本文提出了一种无需训练的预检索框架——假设条件查询重写（Hypothesis-Conditioned Query Rewriting, HCQR），该方法将RAG从以主题为导向的检索转变为以证据为导向的检索。HCQR首先从输入问题和候选选项中推导出一个轻量级的工作假设，然后将原始检索请求重写为三个针对性查询，分别用于：（1）支持该假设；（2）将其与竞争性备选方案区分开来；（3）验证问题中的关键线索。这一策略使上下文检索更加直接地服务于答案选择，从而使生成器能够基于检索到的证据确认或推翻初始假设。在MedQA和MMLU-Med数据集上的实验表明，HCQR始终优于单查询RAG以及重排序/过滤基线方法，相较于Simple RAG，平均准确率分别提升了5.9和3.6个百分点。代码已公开于 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/HCQR-1C2E。

title: PowerFlow: Unlocking the Dual Nature of LLMs via Principled Distribution Matching
authors: Ruishuo Chen, Yu Chen, Zhuoran Li, Longbo Huang
abstract: Unsupervised Reinforcement Learning from Internal Feedback (RLIF) has emerged as a promising paradigm for eliciting the latent capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) without external supervision. However, current methods rely on heuristic intrinsic rewards, which often lack a well-defined theoretical optimization target and are prone to degenerative biases. In this work, we introduce PowerFlow, a principled framework that reformulates unsupervised fine-tuning as a distribution matching problem. By casting GFlowNet as an amortized variational sampler for unnormalized densities, we propose a length-aware Trajectory-Balance objective that explicitly neutralizes the structural length biases inherent in autoregressive generation. By targeting $α$-power distributions, PowerFlow enables the directional elicitation of the dual nature of LLMs: sharpening the distribution ($α> 1$) to intensify logical reasoning, or flattening it ($α< 1$) to unlock expressive creativity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PowerFlow consistently outperforms existing RLIF methods, matching or even exceeding supervised GRPO. Furthermore, by mitigating over-sharpening in aligned models, our approach achieves simultaneous gains in diversity and quality, shifting the Pareto frontier in creative tasks.
title_zh: PowerFlow：通过原则性分布匹配解锁大语言模型的双重特性
abstract_zh: 无监督强化学习中的内在反馈（RLIF）已成为一种有前景的范式，能够在无需外部监督的情况下激发大型语言模型（LLMs）的潜在能力。然而，现有方法依赖于启发式的内在奖励，这些奖励往往缺乏明确的理论优化目标，且容易产生退化偏差。在本工作中，我们提出了PowerFlow，一个具有理论基础的框架，将无监督微调重新定义为分布匹配问题。通过将GFlowNet视为非归一化密度的近似变分采样器，我们提出了一种考虑序列长度的轨迹平衡（Trajectory-Balance）目标函数，该函数能够显式消除自回归生成中固有的结构长度偏差。通过针对$α$-幂分布进行优化，PowerFlow实现了对LLM双重特性的定向激发：当$α>1$时，使分布更加尖锐，以增强逻辑推理能力；当$α<1$时，使分布趋于平坦，从而释放表达性创造力。大量实验表明，PowerFlow在性能上持续优于现有的RLIF方法，其表现可媲美甚至超越有监督的GRPO方法。此外，通过缓解对齐模型中的过度尖锐化问题，我们的方法在创造性任务中同时提升了输出的多样性和质量，显著推动了多样性与质量之间的帕累托前沿。

title: Adaptive Decoding via Test-Time Policy Learning for Self-Improving Generation
authors: Asmita Bhardwaj, Yuya Jeremy Ong, Eelaaf Zahid, Basel Shbita
abstract: Decoding strategies largely determine the quality of Large Language Model (LLM) outputs, yet widely used heuristics such as greedy or fixed temperature/top-p decoding are static and often task-agnostic, leading to suboptimal or inconsistent generation quality across domains that demand stylistic or structural flexibility. We introduce a reinforcement learning-based decoder sampler that treats decoding as sequential decision-making and learns a lightweight policy to adjust sampling parameters at test-time while keeping LLM weights frozen. We evaluated summarization datasets including BookSum, arXiv, and WikiHow using Granite-3.3-2B and Qwen-2.5-0.5B. Our policy sampler consistently outperforms greedy and static baselines, achieving relative gains of up to +88% (BookSum, Granite) and +79% (WikiHow, Qwen). Reward ablations show that overlap-only objectives underperform compared to composite rewards, while structured shaping terms (length, coverage, repetition, completeness) enable stable and sustained improvements. These findings highlight reinforcement learning as a practical mechanism for test-time adaptation in decoding, enabling domain-aware and user-controllable generation without retraining large models.
title_zh: 通过测试时策略学习实现自适应解码，以促进生成过程的自我改进
abstract_zh: 解码策略在很大程度上决定了大语言模型（LLM）输出的质量，然而目前广泛使用的启发式方法，如贪婪解码或固定温度/top-p解码，具有静态特性且通常与具体任务无关，导致在需要风格或结构灵活性的领域中生成质量欠佳或不一致。我们提出了一种基于强化学习的解码采样器，将解码过程视为序列决策问题，并学习一个轻量级策略，在测试阶段动态调整采样参数，同时保持LLM权重冻结不变。我们在BookSum、arXiv和WikiHow等摘要数据集上，使用Granite-3.3-2B和Qwen-2.5-0.5B模型进行了评估。结果表明，我们的策略采样器始终优于贪婪解码和静态基线方法，在BookSum数据集上（Granite模型）实现了高达+88%的相对提升，在WikiHow数据集上（Qwen模型）实现了+79%的相对增益。奖励消融实验显示，仅依赖重叠度的目标函数表现较差，而采用包含长度、覆盖率、重复性及完整性等结构化塑造项的复合奖励机制，则能带来稳定且持续的性能提升。这些发现表明，强化学习是一种切实可行的测试时自适应解码机制，能够在不重新训练大型模型的前提下，实现面向特定领域和用户可控的生成效果。

title: dTRPO: Trajectory Reduction in Policy Optimization of Diffusion Large Language Models
authors: Wenxuan Zhang, Lemeng Wu, Changsheng Zhao, Ernie Chang, Mingchen Zhuge, Zechun Liu, Andy Su, Hanxian Huang, Jun Chen, Chong Zhou, Raghuraman Krishnamoorthi, Vikas Chandra, Mohamed Elhoseiny, Wei Wen
abstract: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) introduce a new paradigm for language generation, which in turn presents new challenges for aligning them with human preferences. In this work, we aim to improve the policy optimization for dLLMs by reducing the cost of the trajectory probability calculation, thereby enabling scaled-up offline policy training. We prove that: (i) under reference policy regularization, the probability ratio of the newly unmasked tokens is an unbiased estimate of that of intermediate diffusion states, and (ii) the probability of the full trajectory can be effectively estimated with a single forward pass of a re-masked final state. By integrating these two trajectory reduction strategies into a policy optimization objective, we propose Trajectory Reduction Policy Optimization (dTRPO). We evaluate dTRPO on 7B dLLMs across instruction-following and reasoning benchmarks. Results show that it substantially improves the core performance of state-of-the-art dLLMs, achieving gains of up to 9.6% on STEM tasks, up to 4.3% on coding tasks, and up to 3.0% on instruction-following tasks. Moreover, dTRPO exhibits strong training efficiency due to its offline, single-forward nature, and achieves improved generation efficiency through high-quality outputs.
title_zh: dTRPO：扩散型大语言模型策略优化中的轨迹缩减
abstract_zh: 扩散型大语言模型（dLLMs）为语言生成引入了一种新范式，同时也给与人类偏好对齐带来了新的挑战。本文旨在通过降低轨迹概率计算的成本，提升dLLMs的策略优化能力，从而实现可扩展的离线策略训练。我们证明了：（i）在参考策略正则化条件下，新解码标记的概率比是中间扩散状态概率比的无偏估计；（ii）通过重新掩码最终状态的一次前向传播，即可有效估计完整轨迹的概率。我们将这两种轨迹压缩策略整合进策略优化目标中，提出了轨迹压缩策略优化方法（dTRPO）。我们在7B规模的dLLM上对dTRPO进行了评估，涵盖指令遵循和推理类基准测试。结果表明，该方法显著提升了当前先进dLLMs的核心性能，在STEM任务上最高提升达9.6%，在编程任务上最高提升达4.3%，在指令遵循任务上最高提升达3.0%。此外，由于dTRPO具有离线、单次前向传播的特性，展现出强大的训练效率，并通过生成高质量输出进一步提升了生成效率。

title: Cross-Ecosystem Vulnerability Analysis for Python Applications
authors: Georgios Alexopoulos, Nikolaos Alexopoulos, Thodoris Sotiropoulos, Charalambos Mitropoulos, Zhendong Su, Dimitris Mitropoulos
abstract: Python applications depend on native libraries that may be vendored within package distributions or installed on the host system. When vulnerabilities are discovered in these libraries, determining which Python packages are affected requires cross-ecosystem analysis spanning Python dependency graphs and OS package versions. Current vulnerability scanners produce false negatives by missing vendored vulnerabilities and false positives by ignoring security patches backported by OS distributions. We present a provenance-aware vulnerability analysis approach that resolves vendored libraries to specific OS package versions or upstream releases. Our approach queries vendored libraries against a database of historical OS package artifacts using content-based hashing, and applies library-specific dynamic analyses to extract version information from binaries built from upstream source. We then construct cross-ecosystem call graphs by stitching together Python and binary call graphs across dependency boundaries, enabling reachability analysis of vulnerable functions. Evaluating on 100,000 Python packages and 10 known CVEs associated with third-party native dependencies, we identify 39 directly vulnerable packages (47M+ monthly downloads) and 312 indirectly vulnerable client packages affected through dependency chains. Our analysis achieves up to 97% false positive reduction compared to upstream version matching.
title_zh: Python 应用程序跨生态系统漏洞分析
abstract_zh: Python 应用程序依赖于可能被打包在软件包分发中或安装在主机系统上的原生库。当这些库中发现漏洞时，确定哪些 Python 软件包受到影响，需要跨越 Python 依赖图谱和操作系统软件包版本的跨生态系统分析。现有的漏洞扫描工具会因遗漏打包的漏洞而产生误报（false negatives），也会因忽略操作系统发行版回溯的安全补丁而产生漏报（false positives）。我们提出一种基于来源可信性的漏洞分析方法，能够将打包的库映射到特定的操作系统软件包版本或上游发布版本。该方法通过基于内容的哈希技术，将打包的库与历史操作系统软件包工件数据库进行比对，并结合针对特定库的动态分析，从上游源码编译生成的二进制文件中提取版本信息。随后，我们通过在依赖边界处拼接 Python 调用图与二进制调用图，构建跨生态系统的调用图，从而实现对存在漏洞函数的可达性分析。在对 10 万个 Python 软件包以及 10 个与第三方原生依赖相关的已知 CVE 进行评估后，我们识别出 39 个直接受影响的软件包（月下载量超过 4700 万次），以及 312 个通过依赖链间接受影响的客户端软件包。与仅依赖上游版本匹配的方法相比，我们的分析可将误报率降低高达 97%。

title: SOL-ExecBench: Speed-of-Light Benchmarking for Real-World GPU Kernels Against Hardware Limits
authors: Edward Lin, Sahil Modi, Siva Kumar Sastry Hari, Qijing Huang, Zhifan Ye, Nestor Qin, Fengzhe Zhou, Yuan Zhang, Jingquan Wang, Sana Damani, Dheeraj Peri, Ouye Xie, Aditya Kane, Moshe Maor, Michael Behar, Triston Cao, Rishabh Mehta, Vartika Singh, Vikram Sharma Mailthody, Terry Chen, Zihao Ye, Hanfeng Chen, Tianqi Chen, Vinod Grover, Wei Chen, Wei Liu, Eric Chung, Luis Ceze, Roger Bringmann, Cyril Zeller, Michael Lightstone, Christos Kozyrakis, Humphrey Shi
abstract: As agentic AI systems become increasingly capable of generating and optimizing GPU kernels, progress is constrained by benchmarks that reward speedup over software baselines rather than proximity to hardware-efficient execution. We present SOL-ExecBench, a benchmark of 235 CUDA kernel optimization problems extracted from 124 production and emerging AI models spanning language, diffusion, vision, audio, video, and hybrid architectures, targeting NVIDIA Blackwell GPUs. The benchmark covers forward and backward workloads across BF16, FP8, and NVFP4, including kernels whose best performance is expected to rely on Blackwell-specific capabilities. Unlike prior benchmarks that evaluate kernels primarily relative to software implementations, SOL-ExecBench measures performance against analytically derived Speed-of-Light (SOL) bounds computed by SOLAR, our pipeline for deriving hardware-grounded SOL bounds, yielding a fixed target for hardware-efficient optimization. We report a SOL Score that quantifies how much of the gap between a release-defined scoring baseline and the hardware SOL bound a candidate kernel closes. To support robust evaluation of agentic optimizers, we additionally provide a sandboxed harness with GPU clock locking, L2 cache clearing, isolated subprocess execution, and static analysis based checks against common reward-hacking strategies. SOL-ExecBench reframes GPU kernel benchmarking from beating a mutable software baseline to closing the remaining gap to hardware Speed-of-Light.
title_zh: SOL-ExecBench：面向真实世界GPU内核的光速基准测试与硬件极限对比
abstract_zh:
随着代理型AI系统在生成和优化GPU内核方面的能力不断增强，当前进展却受到现有基准测试的制约——这些基准主要奖励相对于软件基线的速度提升，而非接近硬件高效执行的程度。为此，我们提出了SOL-ExecBench，这是一个包含235个CUDA内核优化问题的基准测试集，数据源自124个生产环境及新兴的AI模型，涵盖语言、扩散模型、视觉、音频、视频以及混合架构，专为NVIDIA Blackwell GPU设计。该基准覆盖BF16、FP8和NVFP4三种精度下的前向与反向计算负载，其中部分内核的最佳性能预期依赖于Blackwell特有的硬件能力。

与以往主要以软件实现为参照的基准不同，SOL-ExecBench通过SOLAR（我们的硬件基础SOL边界推导管道）计算出解析式的“光速”（Speed-of-Light, SOL）理论极限，将性能评估直接对标这一固定硬件效率目标，从而为高效优化提供明确的追求方向。我们引入了SOL Score，用以量化候选内核在多大程度上缩小了从发布定义的评分基线到硬件SOL极限之间的差距。

为支持对代理优化器的稳健评估，我们还提供了一个沙盒化测试环境，具备GPU时钟锁定、L2缓存清空、隔离子进程执行，以及基于静态分析的常见奖励欺骗策略检测机制。SOL-ExecBench重新定义了GPU内核基准测试的目标：不再追求超越可变的软件基线，而是致力于弥合与硬件“光速”极限之间剩余的性能鸿沟。

title: Entropy trajectory shape predicts LLM reasoning reliability: A diagnostic study of uncertainty dynamics in chain-of-thought
authors: Xinghao Zhao
abstract: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning improves LLM accuracy, yet detecting failures cheaply remains elusive. We study whether the shape of uncertainty dynamics across reasoning steps--captured by sampling a few answer completions per step--predicts correctness. We introduce entropy-trajectory monotonicity: a chain is monotone if its per-step answer-distribution entropy decreases at every step. On GSM8K (n=300) with Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, monotone chains achieve 68.8% accuracy vs. 46.8% for non-monotone chains (+21.9 pp; Fisher's p=0.0005; OR=2.50). Critically, total entropy reduction is not predictive ($ρ$=-0.06, p=0.31), revealing a shape-over-magnitude dissociation: whether entropy decreases at every step matters, not how much. Violation count 0/1/2 gives 68.8%/50.8%/28.6% accuracy. Token log-probability confidence worsens in calibration with step depth (ECE: 0.186->0.312), and monotonicity achieves +5.8 pp at 73.7% coverage, outperforming scalar baselines at approx 1,500 tokens/question--1/8 the cost of 40-chain self-consistency. Results replicate on Mistral-7B (n=300): monotone chains reach 72.3% vs. 37.6% (+34.7 pp; OR=4.33). Structural properties of uncertainty trajectories are thus more informative than aggregate measures.
title_zh: 熵轨迹形态预测大语言模型推理可靠性：对思维链中不确定性动态的诊断研究
abstract_zh:
思维链（Chain-of-Thought, CoT）推理能够提升大语言模型的准确性，但如何低成本地检测推理失败仍是一个难题。我们研究了在推理步骤中不确定性动态变化的“形状”——通过每一步采样少量答案完成情况来捕捉——是否能预测推理结果的正确性。为此，我们提出了**熵轨迹单调性**（entropy-trajectory monotonicity）这一概念：若一个思维链在每一步中其答案分布的熵都持续下降，则该链为单调链。

在GSM8K数据集上（n=300），使用Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct模型进行实验，发现单调链的准确率达到68.8%，而非单调链仅为46.8%（提升21.9个百分点；Fisher精确检验p=0.0005；优势比OR=2.50）。关键的是，总的熵减少量并不具备预测能力（ρ=-0.06，p=0.31），揭示出一种“形状优于幅度”的分离现象：熵是否在每一步都下降，比下降多少更为重要。当熵轨迹违反单调性的次数为0/1/2时，对应准确率分别为68.8%/50.8%/28.6%。

此外，随着推理步骤加深，词元概率置信度的校准性能逐渐恶化（ECE从0.186升至0.312）。而利用单调性筛选，在保持约73.7%覆盖率的前提下，可实现比基线提升5.8个百分点的准确率，且仅需约1,500个token/问题，成本仅为40条链自一致性（self-consistency）方法的1/8。

该结论在Mistral-7B模型上（n=300）也得到复现：单调链准确率达72.3%，非单调链仅为37.6%（提升34.7个百分点；OR=4.33）。这表明，不确定性轨迹的结构性特征（如单调性）比整体聚合指标更具信息量，是更有效的失败检测信号。

title: Mi:dm K 2.5 Pro
authors: KT Tech innovation Group
abstract: The evolving LLM landscape requires capabilities beyond simple text generation, prioritizing multi-step reasoning, long-context understanding, and agentic workflows. This shift challenges existing models in enterprise environments, especially in Korean-language and domain-specific scenarios where scaling is insufficient. We introduce Mi:dm K 2.5 Pro, a 32B parameter flagship LLM designed to address enterprise-grade complexity through reasoning-focused optimization. Our methodology builds a robust data foundation via a quality-centric curation pipeline utilizing abstract syntax tree (AST) analysis for code, gap-filling synthesis for mathematics, and an LLM-based quality evaluator. Pre-training scales the model via layer-predictor-based Depth Upscaling (DuS) and a progressive strategy supporting a 128K token context window. Post-training introduces a specialized multi-stage pipeline, including Reasoning SFT, model merging, and asynchronous reinforcement learning (RL), to develop complex problem-solving skills. "Fusion Training" then rebalances these capabilities with conversational fluency, consistent response styling, and reliable tool-use. The evaluations show that Mi:dm K 2.5 Pro achieves competitive performance against leading global and domestic models. In addition, it sets state-of-the-art results on Korean-specific benchmarks, showcasing deep linguistic and cultural understanding. Finally, Responsible AI evaluations validate safety against attacks, ensuring a secure profile for deployment with a balance of harmlessness and responsiveness.
title_zh: 小米：dm K 2.5 Pro
abstract_zh:
不断演进的大语言模型（LLM）生态对能力提出了更高要求，不再局限于简单的文本生成，而是更加重视多步推理、长上下文理解以及智能体式工作流。这一趋势对企业级应用构成了挑战，尤其是在韩语及特定领域场景中，现有模型的扩展能力仍显不足。为此，我们推出了 Mi:dm K 2.5 Pro——一款拥有320亿参数的旗舰级大语言模型，专为应对企业级复杂任务而设计，核心在于以推理能力为导向的优化。

我们的方法论通过一个以质量为核心的高质量数据构建流程打下坚实基础：利用抽象语法树（AST）分析技术处理代码数据，采用补全式合成方法增强数学数据，同时引入基于大模型的评估机制进行质量筛选。在预训练阶段，我们采用基于层预测器的深度扩展（DuS）技术，并结合渐进式训练策略，成功支持长达128K tokens的上下文窗口。在后训练阶段，我们引入了专门设计的多阶段训练流程，包括推理监督微调（Reasoning SFT）、模型融合以及异步强化学习（RL），从而有效培养模型解决复杂问题的能力。随后，“融合训练”进一步平衡各项能力，在保持对话流畅性、响应风格一致性以及可靠工具使用能力的同时，全面提升综合表现。

评估结果表明，Mi:dm K 2.5 Pro 在与全球及本土领先模型的对比中展现出具有竞争力的性能表现。尤其在韩语专属基准测试中，该模型取得了业界领先水平，充分展现了其对韩语语言特征与文化背景的深刻理解。此外，负责任人工智能（Responsible AI）评估验证了其在对抗攻击下的安全性，确保在部署时具备良好的安全性与响应性之间的平衡，为实际应用提供了可靠保障。

title: Leveraging Large Language Models for Generalizing Peephole Optimizations
authors: Chunhao Liao, Hongxu Xu, Xintong Zhou, Zhenyang Xu, Chengnian Sun
abstract: Peephole optimizations are a core component of modern optimizing compilers. It rewrites specific instruction into semantically equivalent but more efficient forms. In practice, creating a new peephole optimization often starts from a concrete optimization instance and requires lifting it into a more general rewrite rule that matches a wider range of instruction patterns. This generalization step is critical to optimization effectiveness, but it is also difficult: producing rules that are both correct and sufficiently general typically demands substantial manual effort and domain expertise. Existing approaches such as Hydra attempt to automate this task with program synthesis, but their generalization capability is often limited by search-space explosion, under-generalization, and restricted support for diverse instruction domains. We present LPG, large language model aided peephole optimization generalization, a framework that uses large language models (LLMs) to generalize peephole optimizations. The design of LPG is motivated by the observation that LLMs are effective at semantic abstraction and exploratory reasoning, while formal analyses are necessary to ensure that generated rules are sound and profitable. Based on this observation, LPG adopts a closed-loop workflow that integrates LLM-driven symbolic constant generalization, structural generalization, constraint relaxation, and bitwidth/precision generalization with feedback from syntactic validation, semantic verification, and profitability checking. We evaluate LPG on real-world peephole optimization issues drawn from the LLVM ecosystem. Overall, LPG successfully generalizes 90 out of 102 optimizations. On the integer-focused subset that is directly comparable to Hydra, LPG generalizes 74 out of 81 optimizations, whereas Hydra generalizes 35.
title_zh: 利用大型语言模型实现窥视孔优化的泛化
abstract_zh: 窥视孔优化是现代优化编译器的核心组成部分。它将特定指令重写为语义等价但更高效的形态。在实际应用中，创建新的窥视孔优化通常始于一个具体的优化实例，需要将其提升为更通用的重写规则，以匹配更广泛的指令模式。这一泛化步骤对优化效果至关重要，但也极具挑战性：生成既正确又足够通用的规则通常需要大量手动工作和领域专业知识。现有的方法（如Hydra）尝试通过程序合成来自动化该任务，但其泛化能力往往受限于搜索空间爆炸、泛化不足以及对多样化指令域支持有限等问题。我们提出了LPG（Large language model-aided Peephole optimization Generalization），一种利用大语言模型（LLM）进行窥视孔优化泛化的框架。LPG的设计基于如下观察：大语言模型在语义抽象和探索性推理方面表现优异，而形式化分析则对于确保生成规则的正确性和有效性不可或缺。基于这一洞察，LPG采用闭环工作流，融合LLM驱动的符号常量泛化、结构泛化、约束松弛以及位宽/精度泛化，并结合语法验证、语义验证和效益性检查的反馈机制。我们在来自LLVM生态系统的实际窥视孔优化问题上评估了LPG。总体而言，LPG成功泛化了102个优化中的90个；在与Hydra直接可比的整数相关子集上，LPG泛化了81个中的74个，而Hydra仅泛化了35个。

title: TENSURE: Fuzzing Sparse Tensor Compilers (Registered Report)
authors: Kabilan Mahathevan, Yining Zhang, Muhammad Ali Gulzar, Kirshanthan Sundararajah
abstract: Sparse Tensor Compilers (STCs) have emerged as critical infrastructure for optimizing high-dimensional data analytics and machine learning workloads. The STCs must synthesize complex, irregular control flow for various compressed storage formats directly from high-level declarative specifications, thereby making them highly susceptible to subtle correctness defects. Existing testing frameworks, which rely on mutating computation graphs restricted to a standard vocabulary of operators, fail to exercise the arbitrary loop synthesis capabilities of these compilers. Furthermore, generic grammar-based fuzzers struggle to generate valid inputs due to the strict rules governing how indices are reused across multiple tensors. In this paper, we present TENSURE, the first extensible black-box fuzzing framework specifically designed for the testing of STCs. TENSURE leverages Einstein Summation (Einsum) notation as a general input abstraction, enabling the generation of complex, unconventional tensor contractions that expose corner cases in the code-generation phases of STCs. We propose a novel constraint-based generation algorithm that guarantees 100% semantic validity of synthesized kernels, significantly outperforming the ~3.3% validity rate of baseline grammar fuzzers. To enable metamorphic testing without a trusted reference, we introduce a set of semantic-preserving mutation operators that exploit algebraic commutativity and heterogeneity in storage formats. Our evaluation on two state-of-the-art systems, TACO and Finch, reveals widespread fragility, particularly in TACO, where TENSURE exposed crashes or silent miscompilations in a majority of generated test cases. These findings underscore the critical need for specialized testing tools in the sparse compilation ecosystem.
title_zh: TENSURE：模糊测试稀疏张量编译器（注册报告）
abstract_zh:
稀疏张量编译器（STCs）已成为优化高维数据分析和机器学习工作负载的关键基础设施。这些编译器必须从高层声明式规范直接生成针对各种压缩存储格式的复杂且不规则的控制流，因此极易受到细微正确性缺陷的影响。现有的测试框架依赖于对标准操作符词汇表中计算图的变异，无法充分激发编译器在任意循环合成方面的能力。此外，通用的基于语法的模糊测试工具难以生成有效输入，因为跨多个张量索引重用时存在严格的规则限制。

本文提出 TENSURE，这是首个专为 STC 测试设计的可扩展黑盒模糊测试框架。TENSURE 采用爱因斯坦求和（Einsum）记号作为通用输入抽象，能够生成复杂且非传统的张量收缩形式，从而暴露 STC 在代码生成阶段中的边界情况。我们提出一种新颖的基于约束的生成算法，确保所合成内核的语义完全有效，其有效性比率显著优于基线语法模糊测试工具约 3.3% 的水平。为了在无可信参考的情况下实现 metamorphic testing（元变换测试），我们引入了一组语义保持的变异算子，利用代数交换性和存储格式异构性特性。我们在两个最先进的系统——TACO 和 Finch 上进行评估，结果揭示了广泛存在的脆弱性，尤其在 TACO 中，TENSURE 在多数生成的测试用例中发现了崩溃或无声的错误编译问题。这些发现凸显了在稀疏编译生态系统中迫切需要专用测试工具的重要性。

title: Measuring and Exploiting Confirmation Bias in LLM-Assisted Security Code Review
authors: Dimitris Mitropoulos, Nikolaos Alexopoulos, Georgios Alexopoulos, Diomidis Spinellis
abstract: Security code reviews increasingly rely on systems integrating Large Language Models (LLMs), ranging from interactive assistants to autonomous agents in CI/CD pipelines. We study whether confirmation bias (i.e., the tendency to favor interpretations that align with prior expectations) affects LLM-based vulnerability detection, and whether this failure mode can be exploited in software supply-chain attacks. We conduct two complementary studies. Study 1 quantifies confirmation bias through controlled experiments on 250 CVE vulnerability/patch pairs evaluated across four state-of-the-art models under five framing conditions for the review prompt. Framing a change as bug-free reduces vulnerability detection rates by 16-93%, with strongly asymmetric effects: false negatives increase sharply while false positive rates change little. Bias effects vary by vulnerability type, with injection flaws being more susceptible to them than memory corruption bugs. Study 2 evaluates exploitability in practice mimicking adversarial pull requests that reintroduce known vulnerabilities while framed as security improvements or urgent functionality fixes via their pull request metadata. Adversarial framing succeeds in 35% of cases against GitHub Copilot (interactive assistant) under one-shot attacks and in 88% of cases against Claude Code (autonomous agent) in real project configurations where adversaries can iteratively refine their framing to increase attack success. Debiasing via metadata redaction and explicit instructions restores detection in all interactive cases and 94% of autonomous cases. Our results show that confirmation bias poses a weakness in LLM-based code review, with implications on how AI-assisted development tools are deployed.
title_zh: 在LLM辅助的安全代码审查中测量与利用确认偏见
abstract_zh:
安全代码审查日益依赖集成大型语言模型（LLM）的系统，从交互式助手到CI/CD流水线中的自主代理。我们研究了确认偏见（即倾向于采纳与既有预期一致的解释）是否会影响基于LLM的漏洞检测，以及这种失效模式是否可能被用于软件供应链攻击。我们开展了两项互补性研究。

在研究1中，通过在250个CVE漏洞/补丁对上进行受控实验，评估了四种最先进的模型在五种不同提示框架条件下的表现。结果表明，将代码变更描述为“无缺陷”会使得漏洞检测率下降16%至93%，且影响具有显著不对称性：误报率变化不大，而漏报率则急剧上升。不同类型的漏洞对偏见的敏感度也存在差异，其中注入类漏洞比内存破坏类漏洞更容易受到确认偏见的影响。

研究2则在实践中评估了攻击的可利用性，模拟恶意拉取请求（pull request）的行为——即在拉取请求元数据中将已知漏洞的重新引入伪装成安全改进或紧急功能修复。实验结果显示，在单次攻击下，针对GitHub Copilot（交互式助手）的成功率为35%；而在真实项目配置中，攻击者可通过迭代优化其表述框架，对Claude Code（自主代理）的攻击成功率高达88%。

通过删除元数据信息并添加明确指令进行去偏处理，可在所有交互式场景中恢复漏洞检测能力，并在94%的自主代理场景中实现有效检测。

我们的研究结果表明，确认偏见是基于LLM的代码审查中的一个关键弱点，这对AI辅助开发工具的实际部署方式提出了重要警示。

title: SpaceTime Programming: Live and Omniscient Exploration of Code and Execution
authors: Jean-Baptiste Döderlein, Djamel Eddine Khelladi, Mathieu Acher, Benoit Combemale
abstract: Programming environments typically separate the world of static code from the dynamic execution of programs. Developers must switch between writing code and observing its execution, often with limited tools to understand the relationship between code changes and runtime behavior. Several paradigms and approaches exist to bridge this gap, including exploratory programming for comparing code variants, live programming for immediate feedback, and omniscient debugging for exploring execution history. However, existing solutions tend to focus on specific aspects and one specific paradigm rather than providing a fully integrated environment with multiple capabilities. This paper introduces \spacetime Programming, a novel approach that unifies these paradigms to create a programming model for exploring both code modifications and execution flow. At the core of our approach is a trace mechanism that captures not only execution state but also the corresponding code changes, enabling developers to explore programs in both space (code variants) and time (execution flow). As a proof of concept, we implemented a Python library supporting SpaceTime Programming and applied it in two contexts: a live omniscient debugger and a Pygame game development tool, showcased through a Flappy Bird-like game. We further evaluated SpaceTimePy on five real-world Python projects, finding performance overhead ranging from 35% to 150% on test suites.
title_zh: 时空编程：代码与执行的实时全知探索
abstract_zh: 编程环境通常将静态代码世界与程序的动态执行分离开来。开发者必须在编写代码和观察其执行之间来回切换，而用于理解代码变更与运行时行为之间关系的工具往往十分有限。为弥合这一鸿沟，已存在多种范式和方法，包括用于比较代码变体的探索式编程、提供即时反馈的实时编程，以及用于探索执行历史的全知调试。然而，现有解决方案大多聚焦于特定方面或单一范式，缺乏一个集多种能力于一体的完整集成环境。本文提出了一种名为“时空编程”（SpaceTime Programming）的新方法，将这些范式统一起来，构建一种可同时探索代码修改与执行流程的编程模型。我们方法的核心是一个追踪机制，它不仅记录执行状态，还记录相应的代码变更，使开发者能够从空间维度（代码变体）和时间维度（执行流程）两个层面探索程序。作为概念验证，我们实现了一个支持时空编程的 Python 库，并将其应用于两个场景：一个实时全知调试器，以及一个 Pygame 游戏开发工具，通过一个类似《Flappy Bird》的游戏进行了展示。我们进一步在五个真实世界的 Python 项目上对 SpaceTimePy 进行了评估，发现测试套件的性能开销在 35% 到 150% 之间。

title: MemMA: Coordinating the Memory Cycle through Multi-Agent Reasoning and In-Situ Self-Evolution
authors: Minhua Lin, Zhiwei Zhang, Hanqing Lu, Hui Liu, Xianfeng Tang, Qi He, Xiang Zhang, Suhang Wang
abstract: Memory-augmented LLM agents maintain external memory banks to support long-horizon interaction, yet most existing systems treat construction, retrieval, and utilization as isolated subroutines. This creates two coupled challenges: strategic blindness on the forward path of the memory cycle, where construction and retrieval are driven by local heuristics rather than explicit strategic reasoning, and sparse, delayed supervision on the backward path, where downstream failures rarely translate into direct repairs of the memory bank. To address these challenges, we propose MemMA, a plug-and-play multi-agent framework that coordinates the memory cycle along both the forward and backward paths. On the forward path, a Meta-Thinker produces structured guidance that steers a Memory Manager during construction and directs a Query Reasoner during iterative retrieval. On the backward path, MemMA introduces in-situ self-evolving memory construction, which synthesizes probe QA pairs, verifies the current memory, and converts failures into repair actions before the memory is finalized. Extensive experiments on LoCoMo show that MemMA consistently outperforms existing baselines across multiple LLM backbones and improves three different storage backends in a plug-and-play manner. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/ventr1c/memma.
title_zh: MemMA：通过多智能体推理与原位自演化协调记忆周期
abstract_zh: 记忆增强型大语言模型智能体通过维护外部记忆库来支持长时程交互，然而现有大多数系统将记忆的构建、检索与使用视为相互独立的子程序。这带来了两个相互关联的挑战：在记忆循环的前向路径上存在策略性盲区，即记忆的构建与检索由局部启发式方法驱动，而非明确的战略推理；在反向路径上则面临稀疏且延迟的监督，下游任务的失败很少能直接转化为对记忆库的修复。为解决这些问题，我们提出了MemMA——一种即插即用的多智能体框架，能够协调记忆循环在前向与反向路径上的全过程。在前向路径中，一个元思考（Meta-Thinker）生成结构化指导，引导记忆管理器进行记忆构建，并指导查询推理器完成迭代式检索。在反向路径中，MemMA引入了原位自演化记忆构建机制，该机制能够合成探测问答对，验证当前记忆内容，并在记忆最终确定前将失败转化为修复动作。在LoCoMo数据集上的大量实验表明，MemMA在多种大语言模型骨干网络下均持续优于现有基线方法，并以即插即用的方式提升了三种不同的存储后端性能。我们的代码已公开，地址为：https://github.com/ventr1c/memma。

title: SQL-Commenter: Aligning Large Language Models for SQL Comment Generation with Direct Preference Optimization
authors: Lei Yu, Peng Wang, Jingyuan Zhang, Xin Wang, Jia Xu, Li Yang, Changzhi Deng, Jiajia Ma, Fengjun Zhang
abstract: SQL query comprehension is a significant challenge due to complex syntax, diverse join types, and deep nesting. Many queries lack adequate comments, severely hindering code readability, maintainability, and knowledge transfer. Automated SQL comment generation faces two main challenges: limited datasets that inadequately represent complex real-world queries, and Large Language Models' (LLMs) insufficient understanding of SQL-specific semantics. Our empirical analysis shows that even after continual pre-training and supervised fine-tuning, LLMs struggle with complex SQL semantics, yielding inaccurate comments. To address this, we propose SQL-Commenter, an advanced method based on LLaMA-3.1-8B. We first construct a comprehensive dataset of complex SQL queries with expert-verified comments. Next, we perform continual pre-training on a large SQL corpus to enhance the LLM's syntax and semantic understanding, followed by supervised fine-tuning. Finally, we introduce Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) using human feedback. SQL-Commenter utilizes a preference-based loss function to favor preferred outputs, enhancing fine-grained semantic learning and context-dependent quality assessment. Evaluated on the Spider and Bird benchmarks, SQL-Commenter significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. On average, it surpasses the strongest baseline (Qwen3-14B) by 9.29, 4.99, and 13.23 percentage points on BLEU-4, METEOR, and ROUGE-L, respectively. Moreover, human evaluation demonstrates the superior quality of comments generated by SQL-Commenter in terms of correctness, completeness, and naturalness.
title_zh: SQL-Commenter：基于直接偏好优化对齐大型语言模型以生成SQL注释
abstract_zh: SQL查询理解面临巨大挑战，主要源于其复杂的语法结构、多样的连接类型以及深层嵌套。许多SQL查询缺乏充分的注释，严重阻碍了代码的可读性、可维护性以及知识传递。自动化SQL注释生成面临两大难题：一是可用数据集有限，难以充分代表复杂的真实世界查询；二是大型语言模型（LLMs）对SQL特定语义的理解能力不足。我们的实证分析表明，即使经过持续预训练和监督微调，LLMs在处理复杂SQL语义时仍表现不佳，导致生成的注释存在偏差。为解决这一问题，我们提出了基于LLaMA-3.1-8B的先进方法——SQL-Commenter。首先，我们构建了一个包含复杂SQL查询且经专家验证注释的综合性数据集。随后，我们在大规模SQL语料上进行持续预训练，以增强模型对SQL语法与语义的理解，接着开展监督微调。最后，我们引入基于人类反馈的直接偏好优化（Direct Preference Optimization, DPO），利用偏好损失函数引导模型生成更优输出，从而提升细粒度语义学习能力与上下文相关的质量评估水平。在Spider和Bird基准测试上的评估结果表明，SQL-Commenter显著优于现有最先进基线模型。平均而言，其在BLEU-4、METEOR和ROUGE-L指标上分别超越最强基线模型Qwen3-14B达9.29、4.99和13.23个百分点。此外，人工评估也证实，SQL-Commenter生成的注释在准确性、完整性和自然度方面均表现出更高品质。

title: Context Bootstrapped Reinforcement Learning
authors: Saaket Agashe, Jayanth Srinivasa, Gaowen Liu, Ramana Kompella, Xin Eric Wang
abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) suffers from exploration inefficiency, where models struggle to generate successful rollouts, resulting in minimal learning signal. This challenge is particularly severe for tasks that require the acquisition of novel reasoning patterns or domain-specific knowledge. To address this, we propose Context Bootstrapped Reinforcement Learning (CBRL), which augments RLVR training by stochastically prepending few-shot demonstrations to training prompts. The injection probability follows a curriculum that starts high to bootstrap early exploration, then anneals to zero so the model must ultimately succeed without assistance. This forces the policy to internalize reasoning patterns from the demonstrations rather than relying on them at test time. We validate CBRL across two model families and five Reasoning Gym tasks. Our results demonstrate that CBRL consistently improves success rate, provides better exploration efficiency, and is algorithm-agnostic. We further demonstrate CBRL's practical applicability on Q, a domain-specific programming language that diverges significantly from mainstream language conventions.
title_zh: 自举强化学习
abstract_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）存在探索效率低下的问题，即模型难以生成有效的回溯轨迹，导致学习信号极为有限。这一挑战在需要获取新颖推理模式或特定领域知识的任务中尤为严重。为解决该问题，我们提出上下文引导的强化学习（CBRL），通过随机地在训练提示前添加少量示例来增强RLVR的训练过程。注入概率遵循一种课程学习策略：初期设置较高的注入概率以促进早期探索，随后逐渐降低至零，使模型最终必须在无辅助的情况下完成任务。这一机制迫使策略将示例中的推理模式内化，而非在测试时依赖外部示范。我们在两个模型系列和五个Reasoning Gym任务上验证了CBRL的有效性。结果表明，CBRL能够持续提升成功率，显著改善探索效率，并且对算法选择不敏感。此外，我们还展示了CBRL在Q这一领域专用编程语言上的实际应用价值，该语言与主流语言规范存在显著差异。

title: Controller Datapath Aware Verification of Masked Hardware Generated via High Level Synthesis
authors: Nilotpola Sarma, Vaishali Ghanshyam Chaudhuri, Chandan Karfa
abstract: Masking is a countermeasure against Power Side Channel Attacks (PSCAs) in both software and hardware implementations of cryptographic algorithms. Compared to software masking, implementing masked hardware is time consuming and error prone. Recent approaches, therefore, rely on High Level Synthesis (HLS) tools to automatically generate masked Register Transfer Level (RTL) hardware from verified masked software, significantly reducing design effort. Since HLS was never developed for security, HLS optimizations may impact PSCA security of the generated RTL. As a result, verifying the PSCA security of HLS generated masked RTL is crucial. Existing hardware masking verification tools can verify masked hardware, but may produce false positives when applied to HLS generated designs with controller datapath architectures obtained due to resource-shared datapath obtained via HLS. This work proposes a hardware masking verification strategy for HLS generated masked hardware. Our toolflow MaskedHLSVerif, performs state-wise formal verification of controller datapath RTL obtained via HLS, thereby avoiding false positives caused by resource-shared datapaths. Our tool flow correctly verifies standard cryptographic benchmarks, consisting of cascaded masked gadgets and the PRESENT S-box masked with gadgets, where existing tools like REBECCA reports false positives. The proposed tool-flow is able to detect masking flaws induced by HLS-optimizations as well.
title_zh: 基于高层综合生成的掩码硬件的控制器数据通路感知验证
abstract_zh:
掩码是软件和硬件实现密码算法时对抗功耗侧信道攻击（PSCAs）的一种有效对策。与软件掩码相比，硬件掩码的实现过程更加耗时且容易出错。因此，近年来的研究多依赖高层次综合（HLS）工具，从经过验证的掩码软件自动生成掩码的寄存器传输级（RTL）硬件，从而显著降低设计工作量。然而，由于HLS最初并非为安全目的而设计，其优化过程可能影响生成的RTL对PSCA的安全性。因此，验证HLS生成的掩码RTL在PSCA方面的安全性至关重要。

现有的硬件掩码验证工具虽然能够验证掩码硬件，但在处理由HLS生成、具有控制器-数据通路架构（尤其是通过资源共享数据通路获得的）的设计时，往往会产生误报。本文提出了一种针对HLS生成掩码硬件的硬件掩码验证策略。我们提出的工具链MaskedHLSVerif，通过对HLS生成的控制器-数据通路RTL进行逐状态的形式化验证，有效避免了因资源共享数据通路导致的误报问题。

该工具链能够正确验证标准的密码学基准测试，包括级联的掩码门电路以及以掩码门电路实现的PRESENT S盒。而现有工具如REBECCA在这些测试用例上却报告了误报。此外，所提出的工具链还能检测出由HLS优化引入的掩码缺陷。

title: Nemotron-Cascade 2: Post-Training LLMs with Cascade RL and Multi-Domain On-Policy Distillation
authors: Zhuolin Yang, Zihan Liu, Yang Chen, Wenliang Dai, Boxin Wang, Sheng-Chieh Lin, Chankyu Lee, Yangyi Chen, Dongfu Jiang, Jiafan He, Renjie Pi, Grace Lam, Nayeon Lee, Alexander Bukharin, Mohammad Shoeybi, Bryan Catanzaro, Wei Ping
abstract: We introduce Nemotron-Cascade 2, an open 30B MoE model with 3B activated parameters that delivers best-in-class reasoning and strong agentic capabilities. Despite its compact size, its mathematical and coding reasoning performance approaches that of frontier open models. It is the second open-weight LLM, after DeepSeekV3.2-Speciale-671B-A37B, to achieve Gold Medal-level performance in the 2025 International Mathematical Olympiad (IMO), the International Olympiad in Informatics (IOI), and the ICPC World Finals, demonstrating remarkably high intelligence density with 20x fewer parameters. In contrast to Nemotron-Cascade 1, the key technical advancements are as follows. After SFT on a meticulously curated dataset, we substantially expand Cascade RL to cover a much broader spectrum of reasoning and agentic domains. Furthermore, we introduce multi-domain on-policy distillation from the strongest intermediate teacher models for each domain throughout the Cascade RL process, allowing us to efficiently recover benchmark regressions and sustain strong performance gains along the way. We release the collection of model checkpoint and training data.
title_zh: Nemotron-Cascade 2：采用级联强化学习与多领域在线策略蒸馏的后训练大语言模型
abstract_zh:
我们推出Nemotron-Cascade 2，这是一款开源的300亿参数（30B MoE）模型，其中激活参数为30亿（3B），在推理能力与强大的代理（agentic）能力方面达到业界领先水平。尽管模型规模紧凑，其数学与编程推理性能已接近前沿开源模型的表现。它是继DeepSeekV3.2-Speciale-671B-A37B之后，第二款在2025年国际数学奥林匹克竞赛（IMO）、国际信息学奥林匹克竞赛（IOI）以及ICPC世界总决赛中取得金牌级表现的开源大语言模型，展现出惊人的智能密度——仅用前者的1/20参数量便实现了同等高水平的智能表现。

相较于Nemotron-Cascade 1，本版本的关键技术进步如下：在经过精心筛选数据集的监督微调（SFT）后，我们大幅扩展了Cascade强化学习（RL）的覆盖范围，使其涵盖更广泛的推理与代理任务领域。此外，我们在整个Cascade RL过程中引入了多领域在线策略蒸馏（on-policy distillation），从每个领域的最强中间教师模型中进行知识迁移，从而高效地弥补基准测试中的性能下降，并持续保持强劲的性能提升。我们已公开发布模型检查点及训练数据集合。

title: cuGenOpt: A GPU-Accelerated General-Purpose Metaheuristic Framework for Combinatorial Optimization
authors: Yuyang Liu
abstract: Combinatorial optimization problems arise in logistics, scheduling, and resource allocation, yet existing approaches face a fundamental trade-off among generality, performance, and usability. We present cuGenOpt, a GPU-accelerated general-purpose metaheuristic framework that addresses all three dimensions simultaneously. At the engine level, cuGenOpt adopts a "one block evolves one solution" CUDA architecture with a unified encoding abstraction (permutation, binary, integer), a two-level adaptive operator selection mechanism, and hardware-aware resource management. At the extensibility level, a user-defined operator registration interface allows domain experts to inject problem-specific CUDA search operators. At the usability level, a JIT compilation pipeline exposes the framework as a pure-Python API, and an LLM-based modeling assistant converts natural-language problem descriptions into executable solver code. Experiments across five thematic suites on three GPU architectures (T4, V100, A800) show that cuGenOpt outperforms general MIP solvers by orders of magnitude, achieves competitive quality against specialized solvers on instances up to n=150, and attains 4.73% gap on TSP-442 within 30s. Twelve problem types spanning five encoding variants are solved to optimality. Framework-level optimizations cumulatively reduce pcb442 gap from 36% to 4.73% and boost VRPTW throughput by 75-81%. Code: https://github.com/L-yang-yang/cugenopt
title_zh: cuGenOpt：一种用于组合优化的GPU加速通用启发式框架
abstract_zh: 组合优化问题广泛存在于物流、调度和资源分配等领域，然而现有方法在通用性、性能与易用性之间面临根本性的权衡。我们提出 cuGenOpt——一个基于GPU加速的通用型元启发式框架，能够同时解决上述三个维度的挑战。在引擎层面，cuGenOpt 采用“一个块演化一个解”的CUDA架构，结合统一的编码抽象（排列、二进制、整数）、两级自适应算子选择机制以及面向硬件的资源管理策略。在可扩展性层面，通过用户自定义算子注册接口，领域专家可注入针对特定问题的CUDA搜索算子。在易用性层面，采用即时编译（JIT）流水线，将框架暴露为纯Python API，并引入基于大语言模型（LLM）的建模助手，可将自然语言描述的问题自动转换为可执行的求解代码。在三种GPU架构（T4、V100、A800）上对五个主题套件的实验表明，cuGenOpt 相比通用混合整数规划（MIP）求解器性能提升数个数量级，在规模达 n=150 的实例上达到与专用求解器相当的解的质量，并在30秒内实现TSP-442问题仅4.73%的差距。共12种不同类型的问题，涵盖五种编码变体，均被成功求解至最优。框架级优化累计将pcb442问题的差距从36%降低至4.73%，并使VRPTW的吞吐量提升75%-81%。代码地址：https://github.com/L-yang-yang/cugenopt

title: Exploration of Algorithm-Hardware Co-Design for Floating-Point Digital Compute-In-Memory
authors: Xiaochen Peng, Haruki Mori, Abhiroop Bhattacharjee, Brian Crafton, Hidehiro Fujiwara, Kerem Akarvardar
abstract: Digital compute-in-memory (DCIM) has emerged as a promising technique to accelerate deep neural networks by minimizing data-movement and performing near/in-memory computation. While floating-point (FP) arithmetic being widely used in modern AI workloads due to its numerical robustness, supporting FP-DCIM brings design challenges, including dynamic range management, accumulation precision, FP arithmetic strategies and overheads. To address these challenges, we developed hardware-accurate convolutional and fully-connected layer operators to precisely emulate the multiply-and-add (MAC) operation of FP-DCIM. This enabled end-to-end accuracy evaluation under specific hardware design choices along with their quantified impact on both numerical behavior and hardware efficiency. We conduct a comprehensive algorithm-hardware co-design exploration across diverse AI workloads to identify the optimal FP-DCIM architecture that minimizes hardware cost under strict accuracy constraints. Specifically, we show that product mantissa can be truncated to 14b and 12b for FP16-DCIM and FP8-DCIM respectively with no accuracy degradation, while incorporating rounding allows even lower bit-width. These observations further enable exponent-dependent MAC-skipping as an orthogonal iso accurate strategy for additional energy savings. Hardware evaluation on 3nm FP16-DCIM macros indicates that combining the above strategies can reduce power by >37% without compromising accuracy performance.
title_zh: 浮点数字存内计算的算法-硬件协同设计探索
abstract_zh: 数字计算内存（DCIM）作为一种有前景的技术，通过减少数据移动并在近/内存中执行计算，显著加速了深度神经网络的运行。尽管现代人工智能工作负载广泛采用浮点数（FP）运算以保证数值稳定性，但支持FP-DCIM带来了诸多设计挑战，包括动态范围管理、累加精度控制、浮点运算策略选择以及相关开销问题。为应对这些挑战，我们开发了硬件精确的卷积层与全连接层算子，能够精准模拟FP-DCIM中的乘加（MAC）操作。这一方法使得我们能够在特定硬件设计选择下实现端到端的精度评估，并量化其对数值行为和硬件效率的影响。我们针对多种人工智能工作负载开展了全面的算法-硬件协同设计探索，旨在识别在严格精度约束下最小化硬件成本的最优FP-DCIM架构。具体而言，我们发现对于FP16-DCIM和FP8-DCIM，分别可将乘积尾数截断至14位和12位而不会导致精度下降；若引入舍入机制，甚至可进一步降低位宽。基于这些发现，我们提出了一种指数依赖的MAC跳过策略，作为另一种保持精度不变的节能手段，可实现额外的能量节省。在3纳米工艺的FP16-DCIM宏单元上的硬件评估表明，结合上述优化策略后，功耗可降低超过37%，同时不牺牲精度性能。
