title: Automatic State Machine Inference for Binary Protocol Reverse Engineering
authors: Junhai Yang, Fenghua Li, Yixuan Zhang, Liang Fang, Yunchuan Guo, Zifu Li
abstract: Proprietary protocols are widely used to ensure efficient data transmission, enhance privacy, and meet specific application requirements. However, the lack of public standards often leaves their security inadequately evaluated, posing significant challenges for network security. Protocol Reverse Engineering (PRE) is used to analyze protocols by inferring their structure and behavior. However, existing PRE methods primarily focus on protocol format analysis, neglecting Protocol State Machine (PSM) analysis, which can lead to insufficient detection of abnormal behaviors and potential vulnerabilities. To address this, we propose an automatic PSM inference framework for unknown protocols, incorporating a fuzzy membership-based auto-converging DBSCAN algorithm for protocol format clustering, followed by a session clustering algorithm based on Needleman-Wunsch and K-Medoids algorithm to classify sessions by protocol type. Finally, we refine a probabilistic PSM algorithm to infer protocol states and transitions. Experiments show that our method can infer PSMs while enabling precise protocol classification.
title_zh: 二进制协议逆向工程中的自动状态机推断
abstract_zh: 专有协议被广泛用于确保高效的数据传输、增强隐私保护并满足特定应用需求。然而，由于缺乏公开标准，其安全性往往难以得到充分评估，给网络安全带来了重大挑战。协议逆向工程（Protocol Reverse Engineering, PRE）通过推断协议的结构和行为来分析协议。然而，现有的PRE方法主要集中在协议格式分析，忽视了协议状态机（Protocol State Machine, PSM）分析，这可能导致对异常行为和潜在漏洞的检测不足。为解决这一问题，我们提出了一种针对未知协议的自动PSM推断框架：首先采用基于模糊隶属度的自收敛DBSCAN算法进行协议格式聚类；随后，结合Needleman-Wunsch算法与K-Medoids算法，设计一种会话聚类方法，按协议类型对会话进行分类；最后，通过优化概率化PSM算法，推断出协议的状态及其转换关系。实验结果表明，该方法不仅能有效推断出协议状态机，还能实现精确的协议分类。

title: A Zero-Touch O-RAN Framework for Federated Few-Shot IDS with LLM-Oracle Verification
authors: Abdullatif Albaseer, Moqbel Hamood, Raeed Al-Sabri, Mohamed Abdallah, Ala Al-Fuqaha
abstract: This paper presents FFS-ORAN-IDS, a federated few-shot intrusion-detection framework that secures streaming traffic in Open Radio Access Networks (O-RAN) while respecting their stringent latency and resource constraints. The framework addresses the twin challenges of scarce attack labels and heterogeneous data, where naïve pseudo-label injection without sufficient confidence propagates errors, large-scale labeling of streaming traffic is impractical, and inherent uncertainty often requires costly human intervention. FFS-ORAN-IDS combines three coordinated x-functional blocks: a confidence-adaptive curriculum that releases pseudo-labels only when local TabTransformers are reliable, a diversity filter that retains the most informative uncertain packets, and a token-budgeted large-language-model (LLM) oracle that verifies the remaining hard samples. A mixed-integer optimization jointly governs curriculum pacing, sampling size, and Oracle LLM calls so that each federated round minimizes detection loss, propagation error, and LLM token cost under per-round resource caps. We train FFS-ORAN-IDS in two stages: an initial few-shot phase that fits the TabTransformer on the scarce ground-truth packets, followed by iterative rounds that refine the model with oracle-verified pseudo-labels. Experimental evaluation on the CIC-IDS 2018 benchmark shows that the proposed framework improves detection accuracy by 6%, reduces label-error propagation by 20%, and lowers energy consumption by 40% in the most label-constrained scenarios.
title_zh: 面向联邦少样本入侵检测的零接触O-RAN框架及其基于大语言模型的验证机制
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种名为FFS-ORAN-IDS的联邦少样本入侵检测框架，旨在保障开放无线接入网（O-RAN）中流式数据传输的安全性，同时满足其严格的时延与资源约束。该框架应对了两大挑战：攻击标签稀缺以及数据异构性问题。若不加甄别地直接注入伪标签，缺乏足够置信度将导致错误传播；对流式数据进行大规模标注不切实际，而固有的不确定性又常常需要代价高昂的人工干预。FFS-ORAN-IDS结合了三个协同工作的功能模块：一种自适应置信度的课程学习机制，在本地TabTransformer具备可靠性时才释放伪标签；一种多样性过滤器，用于保留最具信息量的不确定数据包；以及一个基于令牌预算的大语言模型（LLM）验证器，用于确认剩余的疑难样本。通过混合整数优化方法，联合调控课程推进节奏、采样规模和LLM调用次数，确保在每轮联邦学习中，在单轮资源上限的约束下，最小化检测损失、错误传播率及LLM令牌消耗成本。我们采用两阶段训练策略：首先进行初始少样本阶段，利用有限的真实标签数据包拟合TabTransformer模型；随后进入迭代轮次，借助经验证器确认的伪标签不断优化模型。在CIC-IDS 2018基准数据集上的实验评估表明，所提框架在检测准确率上提升6%，标签错误传播减少20%，在最严苛的标签受限场景下能耗降低40%。

title: Neural Ensemble of Thought: Toward Human–like AI through Brain–inspired Reasoning
authors: Hyeon-Taek Han, Dae-Hyeok Lee, Sung-Jin Kim, Seong-Whan Lee
abstract: Recent advances in the large language models have substantially enhanced their reasoning capabilities, yet they remain limited in emulating the complexity of human cognition, particularly in nuanced and adaptive reasoning. Although the chain–of–thought has improved reasoning transparency, its sequential paradigm is fragile, with errors propagating easily and the structure failing to capture the interpretable, self–corrective nature of human cognition. To address these limitations, we proposed the neural ensemble of thought (NEoT), the brain– inspired reasoning framework that decomposes cognition into five stages: Conceptual Reconstruction, Rule Maintenance, Computation and Connection, Hypothesis Evaluation, and Integration and Generalization. The NEoT emulates neural ensemble dynamics to enable recursive refinement, self–correction, and interpretability during reasoning. We evaluated the NEoT on the LogiQA and the ReClor using the GPT–4.1–mini and the GPT–4.1, demonstrating consistent improvement in both the accuracy and logical coherence over the backbone models. These results indicated that the NEoT represented a meaningful step toward the human–like, interpretable, iterative, and self–corrective systems.
title_zh: 思维神经集合：通过脑启发式推理迈向类人人工智能
abstract_zh: 近年来，大型语言模型在推理能力方面取得了显著进展，但其在模拟人类认知的复杂性方面仍存在局限，尤其是在细微且灵活的推理能力上。尽管思维链（chain-of-thought）方法提升了推理过程的透明度，但其顺序化范式较为脆弱，错误容易传播，且难以捕捉人类认知中可解释、自我修正的本质特征。为解决这些局限，我们提出了“思想神经集合”（Neural Ensemble of Thought, NEoT）——一种受大脑启发的推理框架。该框架将认知过程分解为五个阶段：概念重构、规则维持、计算与连接、假设评估以及整合与泛化。NEoT通过模拟神经集合的动力学机制，实现了推理过程中的递归优化、自我修正和可解释性。我们在LogiQA和ReClor两个基准测试中，使用GPT-4.1-mini和GPT-4.1对NEoT进行了评估，结果表明，相较于基线模型，NEoT在准确率和逻辑连贯性方面均表现出持续提升。这些成果表明，NEoT朝着实现类人、可解释、迭代式且具备自我修正能力的智能系统迈出了有意义的一步。

title: SemTexIB: Semantic Text Communication with Information Bottleneck: Integrating Rate and Semantic Similarity into Training Objectives
authors: Abdulrahman Alamoudi, Ahmet Faruk Saz, Yashas Malur Saidutta, Faramarz Fekri
abstract: Recent major developments in semantic communication systems stem from integration of deep learning (DL) techniques. Following the discovery of capacity achieving codes, the primary motivation for adopting the semantic approach, which retrieves meaning without requiring an exact reconstruction, is its potential to further conserve resources such as bandwidth and power. In this paper, we propose a novel semantic communication framework for textual data over additive white Gaussian noise (AWGN) channels via DL. Our framework leverages the information bottleneck (IB) principle to balance minimizing bit transmission under wireless channel rate constraints with maximizing semantic information retention. Unlike previous works, we integrate the bilingual evaluation understudy (BLEU) sentence similarity score into the training objective to enhance model performance. In particular, inspired by knowledge distillation, we utilize large language models (LLMs) during training to transfer their knowledge of text semantics into our model. Using IB principle, we train a neural semantic encoder at the transmitter and a neural semantic decoder at the receiver that incorporates into its objective function the rate constraint together with the BLEU score and the knowledge encoded in the soft probabilities produced by the LLM. Through extensive experiments, our proposed framework demonstrates a notable improvement of up to 45% in text semantic similarity compared to state-of-the-art benchmarks operating at the same channel capacity, significantly outperforming traditional communication systems. Moreover, it exhibits robustness to variations in signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) and achieves significant gains across both low and medium SNR regimes.
title_zh: SemTexIB：基于信息瓶颈的语义文本通信：将速率与语义相似性融入训练目标
abstract_zh: 近年来，语义通信系统的主要进展源于深度学习（DL）技术的融合。在发现能够达到信道容量的编码方案之后，采用语义通信方法的核心动机在于：无需精确重建信号即可获取其含义，从而进一步节省带宽、功率等资源。本文提出了一种基于深度学习的新型语义通信框架，用于在加性白高斯噪声（AWGN）信道上传输文本数据。该框架利用信息瓶颈（IB）原理，在满足无线信道速率约束的前提下，平衡最小化比特传输与最大化语义信息保留之间的关系。与以往工作不同，我们创新性地将双语评估替补（BLEU）句子相似度评分引入训练目标函数，以提升模型性能。具体而言，受知识蒸馏思想启发，我们在训练过程中利用大语言模型（LLMs）将其对文本语义的理解能力迁移至本模型中。通过信息瓶颈原则，我们在发送端训练一个神经语义编码器，在接收端训练一个神经语义解码器，该解码器的目标函数不仅包含速率约束和BLEU得分，还融合了LLM生成的软概率中所蕴含的知识。大量实验结果表明，与同等信道容量下的现有先进基准相比，本框架在文本语义相似度方面实现了最高达45%的显著提升，远超传统通信系统。此外，该框架对信噪比（SNR）变化表现出良好的鲁棒性，在低SNR和中等SNR场景下均取得了显著增益。

title: DaV$^\text{3}$is: Data Flow-Based Vulnerability Verification Through Visualization
authors: Tobias Mertz, Steven Lamarr Reynolds, Jörn Kohlhammer
publish: IEEE Transactions on Visualization and Computer Graphics
abstract: Vulnerability verification is an important process in ensuring the security of software systems. To support users in this process, we present the design study of DaV3is, which utilizes visual event sequence analysis techniques to enable the comparison and tracing of automatically detected data flows through the software's source code, thereby allowing users to take advantage of sequence similarities to reduce the verification workload. To that end, we characterize the domain problem based on input from domain users, describe our design rationale based on best-practices from the visual analytics literature, and evaluate individual design decisions, usability, and utility in studies with three stakeholder groups. The evaluations yielded overall positive responses, showing the suitability of our design and providing valuable insight for future research.
title_zh: DaV$^\text{3}$：基于数据流的漏洞验证可视化
abstract_zh: 漏洞验证是确保软件系统安全的重要过程。为了支持用户完成这一过程，我们提出了DaV3is的设计研究，该系统利用可视化事件序列分析技术，实现对自动检测到的数据流在软件源代码中的对比与追踪，从而使用户能够借助序列相似性来降低验证工作量。为此，我们基于领域用户的输入对问题域进行了特征描述，结合可视化分析领域的最佳实践阐述了我们的设计思路，并通过与三类利益相关者群体的实验，评估了各项设计决策、可用性及实用性。评估结果总体呈积极反馈，表明我们的设计方案具有适用性，并为未来的研究提供了宝贵见解。

title: Next-Gen NLP: Leveraging Large Language Models for Domain-Specific Knowledge Extraction
authors: U Ananthanagu, Rekha R Nair, Thrilok. Kolla
publish: 2025 3rd International Conference on Advances in Computation, Communication and Information Technology (ICAICCIT)
abstract: The volume of unstructured texts varies in domains, and more so in biomedical and scientific, and technical literature, thus requiring advanced natural language processing (NLP) techniques to extract knowledge. It is not uncommon for traditional rules or statistically driven approaches to fall short in dealing with the inherent semantic complexity and specialized terminologies of these texts. This paper details a pipeline that exploits large language models (LLMs) alongside classical feature engineering to extract, enrich, and structure complex domain-related knowledge. The framework works by first preprocessing the text and doing term weighting using TF-IDF; later on, it does selection of features and transformer-based named entity recognition (NER) for a domain-specific corpus. A co-occurrence model is used mathematically to analyze relationships between the extracted entities. Eventually, it builds a knowledge graph that structures the relational information for downstream reasoning and analytics. In every phase of the pipeline, formal definitions with their mathematical underpinnings are provided for reproducibility and precision. The framework illustrates the feasibility of hybrid approaches integrating statistical rigor with modern deep learning to bolster confidence and scalability in knowledge extraction for specialized domains.
title_zh: 下一代自然语言处理：利用大语言模型进行领域特定知识提取
abstract_zh: 非结构化文本的体量在不同领域中差异显著，尤其在生物医学、科学及技术文献领域更为突出，因此需要采用先进的自然语言处理（NLP）技术来提取知识。传统基于规则或统计驱动的方法往往难以应对这些文本固有的语义复杂性以及专业术语的挑战，这种情况并不少见。本文详细描述了一个利用大型语言模型（LLMs）与经典特征工程相结合的处理流程，用于提取、丰富并结构化复杂的领域相关知识。该框架首先对文本进行预处理，并使用TF-IDF进行术语加权；随后，针对特定领域的语料库执行特征选择和基于Transformer的命名实体识别（NER）；再通过数学上的共现模型分析所提取实体之间的关系；最终构建一个知识图谱，以结构化方式组织关系信息，供后续推理与分析使用。在该流程的每个阶段，均提供了形式化的定义及其数学基础，以确保方法的可复现性与精确性。该框架展示了将统计严谨性与现代深度学习相结合的混合方法在专业化领域知识提取中的可行性，从而增强了知识抽取的可信度与可扩展性。

title: Task-Aware Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Large Pre-Trained Models at the Edge
authors: Senkang Hu, Yanan Ma, Yihang Tao, Zhengru Fang, Zihan Fang, Yiqin Deng, Sam Tak Wu Kwong, Yuguang Fang
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in various tasks, such as decision-making, reasoning, and question answering. They have been widely used in edge devices. However, fine-tuning LLMs to specific tasks at the edge is challenging due to the high computational cost and the limited storage and energy resources at the edge. To address this issue, we propose TaskEdge, a task-aware parameter-efficient fine-tuning framework at the edge, which allocates the most effective parameters to the target task and only updates the task-specific parameters. Specifically, we first design a parameter importance calculation criterion that incorporates both weights and input activations into the computation of weight importance. Then, we propose a model-agnostic task-specific parameter allocation algorithm to ensure that task-specific parameters are distributed evenly across the model, rather than being concentrated in specific regions. In doing so, TaskEdge can significantly reduce the computational cost and memory usage while maintaining performance on the target downstream tasks by updating less than 0.1% of the parameters. In addition, TaskEdge can be easily integrated with structured sparsity to enable acceleration by NVIDIA’s specialized sparse tensor cores, and it can be seamlessly integrated with LoRA to enable efficient sparse low-rank adaptation. Extensive experiments on various tasks demonstrate the effectiveness of TaskEdge.
title_zh: 面向任务的边缘大型预训练模型参数高效微调
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）在决策、推理和问答等多种任务中取得了显著成功，并已广泛应用于边缘设备。然而，由于边缘设备计算资源高、存储空间有限且能源受限，将LLMs针对特定任务进行微调面临巨大挑战。为解决这一问题，我们提出了TaskEdge——一种面向边缘计算的任务感知参数高效微调框架。该框架能够将最有效的参数分配给目标任务，仅更新与任务相关的特定参数。

具体而言，我们首先设计了一种融合权重和输入激活信息的参数重要性计算准则，以更准确地评估权重的重要性。随后，提出了一种模型无关的任务特定参数分配算法，确保任务相关参数在整个模型中均匀分布，而非集中于某些局部区域。通过这种方式，TaskEdge能够在仅更新不到0.1%参数的情况下，显著降低计算开销和内存占用，同时保持对下游目标任务的良好性能。

此外，TaskEdge可轻松集成结构化稀疏技术，利用NVIDIA专用稀疏张量核心实现加速；同时也能无缝结合LoRA，支持高效的稀疏低秩适应。大量实验结果表明，TaskEdge在多种任务上均表现出卓越的有效性。

title: DACL-RAG: Data Augmentation Strategy With Curriculum Learning for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
authors: Shaohan Wang, Licheng Zhang, Zheren Fu, Zhendong Mao, Yongdong Zhang
publish: IEEE Transactions on Audio, Speech and Language Processing
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is an effective method to enhance the capabilities of large language models (LLMs). Existing methods typically optimize the retriever or the generator in a RAG system by directly using the top-$k$ retrieved documents. However, two key issues inherent in the training data constrain the effectiveness of this training paradigm: (1) across different queries, the top-$k$ retrieved documents vary greatly in content quality, with some providing valuable knowledge while others lack critical information or are even misleading, and training on such data in a purely random manner may impair the generator's ability to extract key information; (2) for a given query, the limited set of $k$ documents often exhibits low discriminability, and training solely on them makes it difficult for the retriever to learn how to distinguish between relevant and irrelevant documents. To address these issues, we introduce DACL-RAG, a multi-stage RAG training framework that combines a multi-level Data Augmentation strategy with a multi-stage Curriculum Learning paradigm. The data augmentation strategy constructs comprehensive and diverse training sets with controllable difficulty levels through sample evolution, while the curriculum learning paradigm organizes them into progressive stages for training, ensuring stable and consistent improvements, thereby optimizing the overall performance and generalization of the RAG system more effectively. Our DACL-RAG framework demonstrates consistent effectiveness across four open-domain QA datasets, achieving performance gains of 2% to 4% over multiple advanced methods.
title_zh: DACL-RAG：基于课程学习的数据增强策略在检索增强生成中的应用
abstract_zh:
检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG）是一种有效提升大语言模型（LLMs）能力的方法。现有方法通常通过直接使用Top-k个检索到的文档来优化RAG系统中的检索器或生成器。然而，这种训练范式受到训练数据中两个关键问题的制约，限制了其实际效果：（1）在不同查询之间，Top-k个检索文档的内容质量差异显著，部分文档包含有价值的知识，而另一些则缺乏关键信息甚至具有误导性。若对这类数据进行完全随机的训练，可能损害生成器提取关键信息的能力；（2）对于特定查询，有限的k个文档集合往往表现出较低的区分度，仅基于这些文档进行训练，使得检索器难以学习如何准确区分相关与无关文档。

为解决上述问题，我们提出DACL-RAG——一种多阶段RAG训练框架，该框架结合了多层次的数据增强策略与多阶段课程学习范式。其中，数据增强策略通过样本演化构建出内容全面、多样性高且难度可控的训练数据集；而课程学习范式则将这些数据按渐进难度组织成多个训练阶段，确保模型在训练过程中实现稳定且持续的性能提升。这一设计有效提升了RAG系统的整体性能与泛化能力。实验结果表明，DACL-RAG在四个开放域问答数据集上均展现出一致的优越性，相较于多种先进方法，性能提升达2%至4%。

title: Web Application Security: Machine Learning–Powered Detection of Cross-Site Scripting
authors: Mohamed Doukkani, Said El Abdellaoui, Ilham Kachbal
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Advances in Data-Driven Analytics And Intelligent Systems (ADACIS)
abstract: The rapid expansion of web applications has intensified the need for advanced security solutions to safeguard sensitive information. Among the various threats targeting online platforms, cross-site scripting (XSS) remains a prominent vector for compromising data integrity and disrupting services. While many existing detection methods rely on pattern matching that leads to high false positives and limited adaptability, this study demonstrates the effectiveness of a lightweight, feature-based machine learning framework for XSS detection. Our work evaluates the performance of traditional, computationally efficient classifiers—Random Forest and Support Vector Classifier (SVC)—by analyzing features derived from URLs. Trained on a large, balanced dataset, the experimental evaluation shows that the Random Forest model achieved strong performance, delivering high detection accuracy with a low false positive rate. These findings underscore the potential of these models to provide strong security with minimal overhead, making them a practical and effective solution for strengthening real-time web application security.
title_zh: Web应用安全：基于机器学习的跨站脚本检测
abstract_zh: Web应用的迅速扩展加剧了对先进安全解决方案的需求，以保护敏感信息。在针对在线平台的各种威胁中，跨站脚本（XSS）仍是破坏数据完整性和扰乱服务的主要攻击手段之一。尽管许多现有的检测方法依赖于模式匹配，导致误报率高且适应性有限，但本研究展示了基于轻量级特征的机器学习框架在XSS检测中的有效性。我们通过分析URL中提取的特征，评估了传统且计算高效的分类器——随机森林（Random Forest）和支持向量分类器（SVC）的性能。模型在大规模、均衡的数据集上进行训练，实验结果表明，随机森林模型表现出优异的性能，实现了高检测准确率和低误报率。这些发现凸显了此类模型在提供强大安全保障的同时，仅带来极小的系统开销，使其成为增强实时Web应用安全性的实用且高效解决方案。

title: MauBa: A Multi-Agent Coordination Framework for Vision-Language-Guided Zero-Shot Control of Unmanned Aerial Vehicles
authors: Yulin Zhu, Zihan Zhao, Shilong Zhang, Junzhe Sun, Keping Yu
abstract: While prompt-based methods have shown initial potential for enabling large language models (LLMs) to control unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs), they suffer from limited flexibility, inadequate visual perception, and low code generation accuracy—often leading to hallucinated outputs due to static templates and rigid API wrappers. To address these limitations, we propose MauBa, a multi-agent coordination framework for zero-shot vision-language UAVs control. MauBa comprises three collaborative agents—Supervisor, Coder, and Tracker—that jointly decompose and execute natural language instructions. The Supervisor manages task delegation and dialogue context; the Coder utilizes a vectorized API knowledge base with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for precise code synthesis; and the Tracker performs object detection and spatial localization via visual grounding. Without any fine-tuning, MauBa achieves task success rates of 93.3% for language-action and 83.3% for vision-language tasks in the AirSim simulation environment, significantly outperforming prompt-based and single-agent baselines in both accuracy and control robustness. Ablation studies further validate the essential role of task coordination and knowledge retrieval in ensuring reliable UAV decision-making. These findings suggest that modular multi-agent collaboration offers a promising pathway for scalable multimodal reasoning in real-world autonomous systems.
title_zh: MauBa：一种用于视觉-语言引导的无人机零样本控制的多智能体协作框架
abstract_zh: 尽管基于提示的方法在使大型语言模型（LLMs）控制无人机（UAVs）方面展现出初步潜力，但其仍存在灵活性不足、视觉感知能力有限以及代码生成准确率低等问题，常因静态模板和僵化的API封装导致幻觉输出。为解决这些局限性，我们提出MauBa——一种用于零样本视觉-语言无人机控制的多智能体协同框架。MauBa由三个协作智能体组成：监督者（Supervisor）、编码者（Coder）和追踪者（Tracker），共同分解并执行自然语言指令。其中，监督者负责任务分配与对话上下文管理；编码者利用带有检索增强生成（RAG）的向量化API知识库，实现精准的代码合成；追踪者则通过视觉定位完成目标检测与空间定位。在无需任何微调的情况下，MauBa在AirSim仿真环境中实现了93.3%的语言-动作任务成功率和83.3%的视觉-语言任务成功率，显著优于基于提示和单智能体基线方法，在准确性与控制鲁棒性方面均表现更优。消融实验进一步验证了任务协调与知识检索在保障无人机可靠决策中的关键作用。研究结果表明，模块化多智能体协作为现实世界自主系统中可扩展的多模态推理提供了一条极具前景的发展路径。

title: Verilog-Driven Simulation and RTL Architecture of the SPECK Cipher for High-Performance Cryptography in VLSI Systems
authors: Shivaputra, Pavithra G.
publish: 2025 3rd International Conference on Advances in Computation, Communication and Information Technology (ICAICCIT)
abstract: In order to ensure data security in resources like wireless sensor networks, built-in systems, and Internet of Things devices, cryptography is essential, which is the background. The NSA created the Speck algorithm in the early part of 2000's as a lightweight encryption block that strikes a compromise between security and effectiveness. The design, simulation, and Verilog implementation of the RTL algorithm are the main objectives of this project. This work's main motivation & objective are creating an efficient Verilog code and using simulation to confirm its accuracy. In order to optimize area, performance, and decryption, the design incorporates key expansion, encryption, and decryption procedures. Testing shots are used to mimic and confirm the validity of the verilog-based design. Through the effective and scalable implementation of Speck-based verilog, appropriate for IoT and built-in systems, this study advances current hardware security research. Expressions for indexes Verilog, design RTL, encryption, key spot, expansion, simulation, light cryptography, decryption are used for problem statement.
title_zh: 基于Verilog的SPECK密码高性能加密在VLSI系统中的仿真与RTL架构
abstract_zh: 为确保无线传感器网络、嵌入式系统及物联网设备等资源中的数据安全，密码学至关重要，这构成了本研究的背景。美国国家安全局（NSA）在2000年代初推出了Speck算法，作为一种轻量级加密分组密码，在安全性与效率之间取得了良好平衡。本项目的主要目标是完成Speck算法的RTL设计、仿真及Verilog实现。本研究的核心动机与目标在于编写高效且准确的Verilog代码，并通过仿真验证其正确性。为优化面积、性能和解密效率，设计中整合了密钥扩展、加密和解密三个核心流程。通过测试用例对设计进行建模与验证，以确认其有效性。本研究通过高效且可扩展的基于Speck的Verilog实现，推动了面向物联网和嵌入式系统的硬件安全研究进展。所涉及的关键术语包括：索引表达式、Verilog语言、RTL设计、加密、密钥扩展、仿真、轻量级密码学、解密。

title: Smart Contract Vulnerability Detection via Heterogeneous Graph Representation and Dual Attention Mechanisms
authors: Yingying Qu, Jiangtao Cui, Haotian Chi, Haijun Geng, Shunrong Jiang, Xiaojiang Du, Weizhi Meng
abstract: In recent years, smart contracts have been widely used in decentralized finance (DeFi), digital asset management, and other blockchain applications. However, security vulnerabilities in smart contracts can result in severe financial losses. Even heterogeneous graph neural network based vulnerability detection methods can learn vulnerability patterns, they consider only a limited set of smart contract properties. Besides, they fail to fully leverage the heterogeneous nature of the graph during feature extraction, restricting their detection performance. To address these challenges, we propose RHGDA-SVD, a method based on rich heterogeneous graph representations and a dual attention mechanism for smart contract vulnerability detection. Specifically, we extends the control flow graph (CFG) by incorporating data dependencies, function calls, and contract inheritance, thereby constructing a heterogeneous graph with enriched smart contract semantics. During feature extraction, RHGDA-SVD employs a dual attention mechanism, capturing the contribution of both intra-type and inter-type nodes to vulnerability detection. Experimental results show that RHGDA-SVD outperforms ten state-of-the-art methods on a dataset aggregated from three data sources. It achieves the highest F1-score across seven high-risk vulnerabilities, with the maximum improvement reaching up to 34.02%.
title_zh: 基于异构图表示与双重注意力机制的智能合约漏洞检测
abstract_zh: 近年来，智能合约在去中心化金融（DeFi）、数字资产管理及其他区块链应用中得到了广泛应用。然而，智能合约中的安全漏洞可能导致严重的财务损失。尽管基于异构图神经网络的漏洞检测方法能够学习漏洞模式，但它们仅考虑了有限的智能合约属性，且未能充分挖掘图结构中异构特性在特征提取阶段的潜力，从而限制了其检测性能。为应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种基于丰富异构图表示与双注意力机制的智能合约漏洞检测方法——RHGDA-SVD。具体而言，我们通过引入数据依赖关系、函数调用以及合约继承信息，扩展了控制流图（CFG），构建了一个语义更丰富的异构图。在特征提取过程中，RHGDA-SVD采用双注意力机制，有效捕捉同一类型节点与不同类型节点对漏洞检测的贡献。实验结果表明，RHGDA-SVD在整合三个数据源的测试集上，优于十种现有的先进方法。在七类高风险漏洞检测中，该方法均取得了最高的F1分数，最大提升幅度达到34.02%。
